json.positionName: Sr. Staff Engineer (Java Fullstack or Python, AI)
json.description:
Company Description

Experian is a global data and technology company, powering opportunities for people and businesses around the world. We help to redefine lending practices, uncover and prevent fraud, simplify healthcare, create marketing solutions, and gain deeper insights into the automotive market, all using our unique combination of data, analytics and software. We also assist millions of people to realize their financial goals and help them save time and money.

We operate across a range of markets, from financial services to healthcare, automotive, agribusiness, insurance, and many more industry segments.

We invest in people and new advanced technologies to unlock the power of data. As a FTSE 100 Index company listed on the London Stock Exchange (EXPN), we have a team of 22,500 people across 32 countries. Our corporate headquarters are in Dublin, Ireland. Learn more at experianplc.com.

Job Description

Design and build end-to-end full stack applications (frontend, backend, APIs, data layers)
Architect scalable, resilient systems using microservices and cloud-native patterns
Integrate Generative AI models (LLMs) into applications for automation, insights, and user experience
Build and optimize AI-driven workflows (RAG pipelines, agents, prompt engineering)
Develop applications using tools like:
OpenAI / Azure OpenAI / Anthropic APIs
LangChain / LlamaIndex / Semantic Kernel
Implement:
Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
Vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, FAISS)
Embedding pipelines and semantic search
Design prompt strategies and evaluation frameworks
Ensure responsible AI practices (safety, bias mitigation, monitoring)
Build modern UI using:
React, Next.js, Angular, or Vue
Create intuitive interfaces for AI-powered features (chat, copilots, dashboards)

Backend Development

Develop scalable services using:
Node.js, Python, Java, or Go
Build REST/GraphQL APIs and real-time systems
Handle orchestration of AI services and workflows
Work with:
SQL/NoSQL databases
Data pipelines and streaming (Kafka, etc.)
Deploy systems using:
AWS / Azure / GCP
Docker, Kubernetes
Implement CI/CD pipelines
Provide technical leadership and mentorshipYou will report to a Senior Engineering Manager

Qualifications

You need to have 8–12+ years of full stack development experience
You need to be expertise in:
Frontend frameworks (React/Next.js preferred)
Backend systems (Node.js / Python / Java)
Experience with system design, scalability, and performance

GenAI & AI/ML

Hands-on experience with:
LLM APIs and GenAI platforms
RAG architectures and vector search
Understanding of:
Prompt engineering
Model evaluation and tuning
Experience building AI-powered applications in production

Modern Tooling

Cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP)
Containerization (Docker, Kubernetes)
DevOps practices and CI/CD
Git, testing frameworks, observability tools
3+ years of experience with AI agents and autonomous workflows
Experience in enterprise-scale systems

Preferred Qualifications

Experience with AI agents and autonomous workflows
Exposure to MLOps pipelines
Experience in enterprise-scale systems

Additional Information

Our uniqueness is that we truly celebrate yours. Experian's culture and people are important differentiators. We take our people agenda very seriously and focus on what truly matters; DEI, work/life balance, development, authenticity, engagement, collaboration, wellness, reward & recognition, volunteering... the list goes on. Experian's strong people first approach is award winning; Great Place To Work™ in 24 countries, FORTUNE Best Companies to work and Glassdoor Best Places to Work (globally 4.4 Stars) to name a few. Check out Experian Life on social or our Careers Site to understand why.

Experian is proud to be an Equal Opportunity and Affirmative Action employer. Innovation is a critical part of Experian's DNA and practices, and our diverse workforce drives our success. Everyone can succeed at Experian and bring their whole self to work, irrespective of their gender, ethnicity, religion, color, sexuality, physical ability or age. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know at the earliest opportunity.

Experian Careers - Creating a better tomorrow together

Benefits

Experian care for employee's work life balance, health, safety and wellbeing. In support of this endeavor, we offer best-in-class family well-being benefits, enhanced medical benefits and paid time off.

#LI-Onsite

Experian Careers - Creating a better tomorrow together

Find out what its like to work for Experian by clicking here

json.description:
Company Description

Bosch Global Software Technologies Private Limited is a 100% owned subsidiary of Robert Bosch GmbH, one of the world's leading global supplier of technology and services, offering end-to-end Engineering, IT and Business Solutions. With over 27,000+ associates, it’s the largest software development center of Bosch, outside Germany, indicating that it is the Technology Powerhouse of Bosch in India with a global footprint and presence in the US, Europe and the Asia Pacific region.

Job Description

Role: Senior Backend Engineer (Java/Python) – Toolchain & Knowledge Graph

The Opportunity

Join our global, high-performing engineering team as a Backend Engineer. You will be at the heart of the Process-Tools organization, driving the evolution of our new central engineering toolchain. This role is crucial for our "Elefanto" team where you will build the data backbone that connects disparate tools like Jira, Codebeamer, and Splunk into a unified, intelligent system.

Operating within a framework inspired by SFIA, you will not just execute tasks, but take full ownership of your solutions, from concept to delivery. You will collaborate daily with our development team in Germany and key stakeholders across the business, contributing to a culture of technical excellence and innovation.

Key Responsibilities

As a key member of our team, you will be entrusted with significant autonomy and responsibility. Your contributions will directly influence the efficiency and capabilities of our engineering processes.

Architect and Develop Backend Solutions: Design, build, and maintain robust, scalable backend services using Java and Python to power our "Elefanto" knowledge graph platform and enhance integrations with tools like Jira, Codebeamer, and Splunk.
Drive Data Integration & Streaming: Engineer high-performance data pipelines using Apache Kafka. Implement and optimize producers and consumers to ensure reliable, real-time data flow that underpins our entire tool ecosystem.
Master Semantic Web Technologies: Utilize your expertise in SPARQL, GraphQL, and RML to create sophisticated data models, mappings, and APIs. You will be responsible for transforming data from various sources into our central, tool-agnostic ontology.
Foster Global Collaboration & Agile Excellence: Partner closely with our development team in Germany and stakeholders like Process Architects to define requirements, design innovative features, and ensure solutions meet concrete business needs.
Champion Code Quality and Ownership: Uphold the highest standards by actively participating in peer code reviews and taking end-to-end responsibility for the quality, maintenance, and support of your code.

Core Qualifications (Your Must-Have Skills)

Educational Foundation: A Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related technical field.
Proven Backend Experience: 3+ years of professional experience in designing and developing complex backend applications, with a strong portfolio in Java. Proficiency in Python for backend development is also required.
Data Streaming Expertise: Hands-on experience with Apache Kafka or a similar message bus, with a solid understanding of event-driven architecture.
Familiarity with Semantic Technologies: Demonstrable experience or strong theoretical knowledge of Knowledge Graphs and related technologies (SPARQL, GraphQL, RML).
Problem-Solving Mindset: A strong sense of ownership and the ability to independently troubleshoot complex technical challenges and deliver reliable solutions.
Team & Communication Skills: Excellent English communication skills and a proven ability to thrive in a collaborative, agile, and globally distributed team environment.

Preferred Qualifications (Your Bonus Skills)

Tool Architecture Knowledge: Deep understanding of the APIs and architectures of tools like Jira, Codebeamer, or IBM ETM.
AI & Prompt Engineering: Experience or a keen interest in Large Language Models (LLMs) prompt engineering and agentic workflows is a significant plus.

Qualifications

B.E / B.Tech / MCA / M.Sc

Additional Information

6 to 9 years

json.description:
At NiCE, we don’t limit our challenges. We challenge our limits. Always. We’re ambitious. We’re game changers. And we play to win. We set the highest standards and execute beyond them. And if you’re like us, we can offer you the ultimate career opportunity that will light a fire within you.

So, what’s the role all about?

At NiCE, we don’t limit our challenges. We challenge our limits. Constantly. We’re relentless. We’re ambitious. And we make an impact. Our NiCErs bring their A game and spend each day turning it into an A+. And if you’re like us, we can offer you the kind of challenge that will light a fire within you.

We are looking for a skilled Software Engineer to work closely with R&D teams, Product Management, and cross-functional groups across global locations. The engineer will contribute to designing, developing, and maintaining scalable applications while collaborating with teams in Israel, Pune, and other regions.

We encourage innovative ideas, flexible work methods, knowledge collaboration, and good vibes!

How will you make an impact?

Design, develop, and maintain high-quality, scalable, and reliable software applications
Collaborate with product managers, architects, and other developers to understand requirements and deliver robust solutions
Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code following best practices
Participate in code reviews to ensure code quality and consistency
Develop and integrate APIs, services, and backend systems
Debug, troubleshoot, and resolve application issues in development and production environments
Contribute to software design decisions, architecture discussions, and technical improvements
Optimize application performance, scalability, and reliability
Work closely with QA teams to ensure high-quality releases
Participate in Agile ceremonies such as sprint planning, stand-ups, and retrospectives

Have you got what it takes?

2–4 years of experience as a Software Engineer or similar role
Strong programming skills in one or more languages such as Java, Python (Good to have)
Experience with backend development frameworks (e.g., Spring Boot)
Understanding of data structures, algorithms, and object-oriented design principles
Experience working with RESTful APIs and microservices architecture
Familiarity with databases (MSSQL, MySQL, PostgreSQL)
Knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS) is a plus
Exposure to CI/CD pipelines and version control systems (Git)
Familiarity with containerization (Docker) is a plus
Strong problem-solving and debugging skills
Good understanding of software development lifecycle (SDLC) and Agile methodologies
Strong written and verbal communication skills

You will have an advantage if you also have:

Knowledge of distributed systems and system design
Exposure to DevOps practices and tools
Experience with performance tuning and scalability improvements
Cloud certifications (AWS / Azure / GCP)
Programming or framework-related certifications

What’s in it for you?

Join an ever-growing, market disrupting, global company where the teams – comprised of the best of the best – work in a fast-paced, collaborative, and creative environment! As the market leader, every day at NiCE is a chance to learn and grow, and there are endless internal career opportunities across multiple roles, disciplines, domains, and locations. If you are passionate, innovative, and excited to constantly raise the bar, you may just be our next NiCEr!

 Enjoy NiCE-FLEX!

At NiCE, we work according to the NiCE-FLEX hybrid model, which enables maximum flexibility: 2 days working from the office and 3 days of remote work, each week. Naturally, office days focus on face-to-face meetings, where teamwork and collaborative thinking generate innovation, new ideas, and a vibrant, interactive atmosphere.

Requisition ID: 10932
Reporting into: Manager
Role Type: Individual Contributor

About NiCE

NICE Ltd. (NASDAQ: NICE) software products are used by 25,000+ global businesses, including 85 of the Fortune 100 corporations, to deliver extraordinary customer experiences, fight financial crime and ensure public safety. Every day, NiCE software manages more than 120 million customer interactions and monitors 3+ billion financial transactions.

Known as an innovation powerhouse that excels in AI, cloud and digital, NiCE is consistently recognized as the market leader in its domains, with over 8,500 employees across 30+ countries.

NiCE is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, age, sex, marital status, ancestry, neurotype, physical or mental disability, veteran status, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other category protected by law.

Anovia (formerly Innovatia Technical Services) is an industry-leading technology outsourcing support provider with expertise in the telecommunications industry. Operating for over 20 years, we specialize in workflow and knowledge processes, as well as technical support, helpdesk, and multilingual support services. With over 200 professional experts across the globe, we service some of the world's most successful Fortune 500 and Fortune 1000 companies.

Job Summary: We are looking for a skilled Full Stack Developer with experience to join our team.

Key Responsibilities:

Develop and maintain scalable web applications using Python, .NET (ASP.NET Core) on the backend and React on the frontend.
Collaborate with UI/UX designers, product managers, and other developers to define, design, and ship new features.
Design and optimize relational (SQL Server/PostgreSQL) and/or NoSQL (MongoDB/Cosmos DB) databases.
Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code with a strong emphasis on performance and scalability.
Implement RESTful APIs and integrate third-party APIs and services.
Conduct code reviews, write unit/integration tests, and follow Agile development practices.
Troubleshoot and debug application issues across the stack.
Perform deployment activities including publishing and hosting applications on Azure App Services and IIS servers.
Stay current with emerging technologies and trends to improve our applications and development processes.

Required Skills and Qualification:

Bachelor's degree in computer science, Information Technology, or related field (or equivalent experience).
2+ years of experience in development of web applications.
Proficiency in React.js,.Net Core, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS
Experience developing and consuming REST APIs
Hands-on experience with SQL Server/PostgreSQL and/or MongoDB/Cosmos DB
Experience with Azure cloud services
Strong debugging, problem-solving, and analytical skills
Experience with version control tools (e.g., Git).

Excellent communication and collaboration skills.

On-site

Svitla Systems Inc. is looking for an Agentic Software Engineer for a full-time position (40 hours per week) in the office at Hudson Yards, New York, the USA.

You'll build the data platforms, infrastructure, and data products that enable investment professionals and business users to create AI-powered workflows and applications safely. The role's core mission is to build the data platform, APIs, workflow infrastructure, and self-serve tooling that make AI useful across the organization. You will create the foundations that let non-developers work with AI in a fast, secure, reliable, and scalable way, including curated data products and APIs, workflow frameworks, application scaffolding, and controlled interfaces to internal data and services. This role also requires a modern engineering mindset. The ideal candidate is excited by the emerging world of agentic engineering and harness engineering, where engineers direct multiple AI agents to produce high-quality production code at high velocity. The perfect candidate combines strong technical execution, solid software design and coding principles, data pipeline construction, and sharp product intuition, with a proven ability to ship independently and at high velocity.

REQUIREMENTS
Strong understanding of software engineering with experience building production backend systems, platforms, or data infrastructure.
Proven experience in system design and architecture for large-scale or business-critical platforms.
Understanding of building APIs, services, data pipelines, or workflow infrastructure.
Understanding of modern cloud architecture (AWS or other clouds), distributed systems, and platform operations.
Strong knowledge of Python and SQL.
Experience building data products, internal platforms, or self-serve infrastructure for technical or non-technical users.
Deep curiosity about AI-native development and enthusiasm for working in a world where multiple agents are part of the engineering loop.
Hands-on experience building pipelines that integrate real-time and batch data sources across structured and unstructured formats.
Experience with LLM applications, vector database, graph databases, retrieval systems, semantic search, AI orchestration, and multi-agent frameworks.
Entrepreneurial, high-energy individual with eagerness to operate with high urgency, ownership, and creativity in a fast-moving environment.
Strong problem-solving and analytical skills, with the ability to synthesize complex, multi-source data into clear, actionable outputs.
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills with the ability to translate technical findings into formats appropriate for PMs, risk officers, and traders.
Demonstrated ability to manage multiple workstreams, prioritize under pressure, and meet deadlines in a fast-moving investment environment.
Ability to work independently and as part of a cross-functional team spanning many business teams, including Investment, Data Science, Risk, and Trading.
RESPONSIBILITIES
Build the AI-Native Data Platform:
Design and build the core data platform that powers AI applications, analytics, and operational workflows.
Develop secure, scalable, reliable, and discoverable data products for both humans and AI systems.
Create data access patterns that are easy to use, safe by default, and robust at scale.
Build and maintain APIs and service layers on top of internal data to support downstream applications, automation, and AI workflows.
Contribute to semantic and application-facing data layers so users can interact with clean, business-meaningful abstractions rather than raw source systems.
Enable Non-Developers to Build with AI:
Build platform capabilities that allow investment staff and business users to create AI-powered applications and workflows without requiring deep engineering support.
Design safe self-serve patterns for prompt-backed workflows, retrieval-based apps, internal copilots, structured automation, and task-specific AI tools.
Create reusable templates, connectors, workflow abstractions, approval steps, permissions models, and operational guardrails.
Ensure these capabilities are secure, observable, auditable, and easy to adopt.
Build APIs, Workflows, and Application Infrastructure:
Develop APIs and backend services that expose internal data and business logic for use by internal apps, agents, and workflows.
Build workflow engines and orchestration layers that combine data retrieval, business rules, model calls, and human review where needed.
Design systems that support asynchronous, long-running, and stateful business processes.
Create reusable platform primitives so teams can assemble AI-enabled use cases quickly without rebuilding infrastructure from scratch.
Practice High-Leverage Agentic Engineering:
Use modern AI-native development workflows to accelerate engineering output dramatically from 10x to 100x.
Operate effectively in an environment where engineers direct multiple agents in parallel for coding, testing, refactoring, documentation, and debugging.
Use these methods to ship production code quickly and continuously while maintaining quality.
WE OFFER
US and EU projects based on advanced technologies.
Competitive compensation based on skills and experience.
Flexibility in workspace, either remote or our welcoming office.
Bonuses for article writing, public talks, and other activities.
Free tech webinars and meetups organized by Svitla.
Regular corporate online activities.
Awesome team, friendly and supportive community!
ABOUT SVITLA

Svitla Systems is a global digital solutions company headquartered in the U.S. and operating across the Americas, Europe, Asia, and APAC. Since 2003, we have served a wide range of clients — from innovative start-ups to Fortune 500 companies.

Our success is built on partnership. By integrating seamlessly with clients’ teams, we create lasting collaborations that drive real results.

We are strong advocates of workplace flexibility, remote culture, individual approach to professional and personal growth.

Svitla is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for cooperation without regard to age, gender identity, sexual orientation, religion, race, color, national origin, disability, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law.

Our global mission is to build a business that contributes to wellbeing of our partners, personnel, and their families, improves our communities, and makes a lasting difference in the world.

Together, we are coding a brighter tomorrow — and living it.

Join us!

LET'S MEET IN PERSON
Khrystyna Shuflat
RECRUITER
Email:
k.shuflat@svitla.com
LinkedIn:
Khrystyna Shuflat

json.description:
Job Title: Senior Software Engineer, Backend
Department: Engineering
Reports To: Technical Manager
Location: Bangalore
Employment Type: Full time
Role Summary
At AliveCor, we imagine a healthier world powered by access to personalized intelligent information. The Senior Software Engineer, Backend will be an integral member of our engineering team, responsible for developing, scaling, and maintaining high-availability microservices that process millions of critical heart health measurements. This role directly contributes to AliveCor’s mission of transforming cardiological care by building industry-leading, FDA-cleared software that connects consumers and clinicians with life-saving data.
Core Responsibilities
Scalable Architecture: Build, scale, and maintain robust, high-concurrency microservices utilizing GoLang, Java, Python, PostgreSQL, and AWS infrastructure.

Cross-Functional Integration: Partner closely with mobile, front-end, product, and design teams to rapidly prototype, iterate, and launch consumer- and clinician-facing applications.

Internal Tooling & R&D: Create, optimize, and maintain internal tools used for customer service, real-time system monitoring, and machine learning/R&D data pipelines.

Infrastructure Optimization: Leverage Docker and Kubernetes to continuously monitor, containerize, and optimize backend infrastructure, preemptively resolving technical limitations and system bottlenecks.

CI/CD Integration: Own and automate build processes and continuous integration/continuous deployment (CI/CD) pipelines to maintain zero-downtime release velocities.
AI Enhanced Responsibilities
AI Use Case

Tools / Platforms

Expected Impact

Familiarity to with Gen-AI tools

Gemini, Claude, Copilot

Reduce manual code writing to 10% and improve delivery turn around time by 70-80%.
Required Qualifications
Experience: 5+ years of relevant software engineering experience in a product-driven, high-concurrency environment.

Core Languages: Strong, production-grade experience working with GoLang (highly required), API Design, REST Services alongside solid database management using Postgres, Redis, and DynamoDB.

Cloud & DevOps: Hands-on operational knowledge of AWS (S3, EC2) and container orchestration via Kubernetes & Docker.

Preferred Assets: Active knowledge or strong interest in learning Java and Python; explicit experience implementing Service-Oriented Architecture (SOA) or microservice patterns.

Soft Skills: Product instincts with the ability to prototype rapidly based on customer pain points; ability to work independently and communicate seamlessly across global, cross-functional timelines.
AI Competency Expectations
Competency

Level Expected

AI Tool Proficiency

Intermediate

Prompt Engineering

Working knowledge

AI Output Evaluation

Review AI outputs

AI Ethics & Data Privacy

Understands responsible AI use and company data policies
Why join AliveCor?
At AliveCor, we imagine a healthier world powered by access to personalized intelligent information. We're on a mission to be the world’s heart health partner by enabling access to quality heart care for everyone. AliveCor has pioneered over-the-counter medical ECG devices and continues to lead the way in empowering consumers and patients to take care of their heart. Using our FDA-cleared medical-grade hardware and software, millions of users have taken more than 200 million heart health measurements and counting.
Our vibrant team of people are attracted to AliveCor because they want to build something meaningful - and AliveCor delivers: every day, customers tell us that we’ve saved lives. Join us in our mission!
Perks and benefits:
We strive to make your life outside work as smooth as possible while you're at work, and we offer a long list of benefits to make that happen.

Hybrid working model
Flexible and generous vacation policy
Maternity / Paternity Leave/ Adoption/ Commissioning leave
Generous Medical Benefits Above market family floater medical insurance coverage including both parents or in law parents
Metro connectivity from office
A supportive, collaborative group of people who understand that success depends on the team

json.description:
Job Description

Noventiq is hiring!

Noventiq (Noventiq Holdings PLC) is a leading global solutions and services provider in digital transformation and cybersecurity, headquartered in London. The company enables, facilitates, and accelerates digital transformation for its customers’ businesses, connecting 80,000+ organizations across all sectors with a vast selection of best-in-class IT vendors, alongside its own services and solutions.

 Noventiq delivered record gross revenue of $1.6 billion for the 12 months to March 31, 2023, an increase of 52% in constant currency. The company’s growth is underpinned by its three-dimensional strategy to expand its markets, portfolio, and sales channels. The strategy is supported by an active approach to M&As which enables Noventiq to take advantage of the ongoing consolidation in the industry. Noventiq's 6,400 employees work in approximately 60 countries throughout Asia, Latin America, Europe, Middle East, and Africa—markets with significant growth potential.

• One of the largest SI’s in India with revenue close to 700M$ and growing to 900M$.

• 3500+ Employees in India for India.

• Total 28 Offices in India across North, South, West & East.

• 1000+ Resident Engineers across India.

• 2500+ technical resources in India for India.

• Technology partnerships with Top 3 Cloud Solution Providers, Top 3 Infrastructure companies, Top 10 Cybersecurity companies.

• Enviable customer base: 4 of Top 5 Banks, 3 of Top 5 IT companies, 3 of Top 5 BPO’s, 3 of Top 5 Pharma companies.

• Largest partner to Microsoft with combined infeed of US$600M about 25% of Microsoft India revenues.

About You:

Frontend

· Proficiency in HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript

· Experience with modern frameworks like React.js / Angular / Vue.js

· Strong understanding of UI/UX principles

Backend:

· Experience in Node.js / .NET / Java / Python

· Agentic Framework - LangGraph, AutoGen

· API development (REST/GraphQL)

· Understanding of microservices architecture

Database:

· Experience with relational databases (SQL Server, MySQL, PostgreSQL)

· Knowledge of NoSQL databases (MongoDB, Cosmos DB, DynamoDB)

Cloud & DevOps:

· Hands-on experience with Microsoft Azure and/or Amazon Web Services

· Experience with services like:

· Azure App Service / AWS EC2 / Lambda

· Azure Functions / AWS Lambda (Serverless)

· Azure DevOps / AWS CodePipeline

· CI/CD pipeline implementation

· Containerization using Docker (preferred)

· Knowledge of Kubernetes is a plus

Additional Skills (Good to Have)

· Experience with authentication systems (OAuth, Azure AD B2C, JWT)

· Familiarity with Agile/Scrum methodologies

· Knowledge of version control tools (Git)

· Exposure to AI/ML integrations or APIs is a plus

· Experience with monitoring tools (Azure Monitor, CloudWatch)

Educational Qualification

· Bachelor’s degree in computer science, IT, or related field

Soft Skills

· Strong problem-solving and analytical skills

· Good communication and collaboration abilities

· Ability to work in a fast-paced environment

· Ownership mindset and proactive attitude

Nice-to-Have Domain Experience

· Experience working on enterprise applications

· Exposure to BFSI / Healthcare / Public Sector projects (optional)

What you ‘ll do:

· Design, develop, and maintain scalable web applications (end-to-end)

· Build responsive and user-friendly front-end interfaces

· Develop robust backend services and APIs

· Deploy, manage, and monitor applications on Azure/AWS cloud platforms

· Collaborate with cross-functional teams (product, UI/UX, DevOps)

· Ensure application performance, security, and scalability

· Participate in code reviews and maintain coding standards

· Troubleshoot and debug production issues

· Implement CI/CD pipelines and DevOps best practices

.

json.description:
Bangalore Full-Time Senior

About this role
We are building the next-generation technology platforms that power the Lenskart Group — spanning multiple brands (Lenskart, Owndays, Meller, Aqualens) and operating across geographies including India, KSA, UAE, Singapore, Japan, and beyond. As a Backend Developer, you’ll play a key role in shaping the core systems that drive this global vision — from intelligent inventory and omnichannel commerce to personalized experiences powered by AI and data. You’ll design and build high-performance backend services that scale seamlessly across markets and products, delivering delightful and frictionless eyewear experiences to millions of customers worldwide. Key Responsibilities Design, develop, and own microservice-based backend applications using Java Spring Boot. Build APIs and platforms that serve multiple brands and geographies, ensuring scalability and flexibility for global rollout. Implement event-driven architectures for systems like order management, fulfillment, and inventory synchronization. Integrate AI-driven capabilities such as personalized recommendations, intelligent product search, and predictive operations. Collaborate closely with product, AI/ML, DevOps, and frontend teams to build systems that bridge online and offline experiences. Design efficient database schemas (MySQL, MongoDB), optimize data flows, and maintain consistency across distributed systems. Monitor, optimize, and scale backend services for performance, reliability, and global availability. Participate in code reviews, architectural discussions, and innovation sprints to drive continuous improvement. Required Skills & Qualifications 3–8+ years of backend development experience using Java Spring Boot Strong understanding of microservices architecture and REST API design Proficiency in SQL and NoSQL databases (MySQL, MongoDB) Experience with event-driven systems and message brokers (Kafka or similar) Familiarity with caching strategies (Redis, Memcached) and x design Solid foundation in object-oriented programming, design patterns, and clean code principles Experience with Git, CI/CD pipelines, and deployments on AWS or GCP Nice to Have Experience building multi-brand or multi-tenant platforms Exposure to AI/ML integrations in production environments Background in e-commerce, retail tech, or global-scale applications Knowledge of Docker, Kubernetes, Elasticsearch, and recommendation engines Why Join Us Build the global technology backbone of Lenskart Group — uniting brands, markets, and customer journeys under one intelligent platform Work at the intersection of vision, design, and AI, redefining how the world discovers and experiences eyewear Be part of a fast-scaling, global tech team solving complex challenges with data, systems thinking, and creativity Enjoy a culture of innovation, ownership, and collaboration Competitive compensation, learning opportunities, and a chance to create impact at global scale At Lenskart, you won’t just write code — you’ll help build the intelligent platforms that shape how the world sees.

Details

Job Type

Full-Time

Experience

Senior

Category

Technology

Deadline

Posted on 12/9/2025

json.descriptionHTML:
Job Summary

As a Backend Developer at Hack2skill, you will be instrumental in architecting, developing, and maintaining robust server-side applications to support our web infrastructure. Leveraging your expertise in backend technologies, you will collaborate closely with our development team to create efficient and scalable solutions. Your responsibilities will include designing and implementing APIs, optimizing database structures, and ensuring seamless integration between front-end and back-end systems. Additionally, you will play a key role in ensuring the security and performance of our web applications.

Key responsibilities

  • Develop, and maintain server-side applications using cutting-edge technologies.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design and implement RESTful APIs.
  • Optimise database performance and ensure data integrity across all backend systems.
  • Implement security best practices to safeguard sensitive information and prevent unauthorized access.
  • Work closely with front-end developers to ensure seamless integration between client and server components.
  • Stay up-to-date with emerging technologies and industry best practices to continuously improve our backend infrastructure.
  • Participate in code reviews, debugging, and troubleshooting to ensure high-quality deliverables.
  • Contribute to the overall architecture and technical roadmap of our web applications.
  • Write clean unit-testable code keeping in mind both functional and non-functional requirements.
  • Documentation of all the features as well as requirements.

Requirements

  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.
  • Proven experience in backend development with proficiency in Node Js and Express JS.
  • Strong understanding of server-side technologies including but not limited to databases (SQL and NoSQL), caching mechanisms, and web servers.
  • Experience designing and implementing RESTful APIs and microservices architecture.
  • Familiarity with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) and containerization technologies (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes).
  • Solid understanding of software engineering principles, design patterns, and best practices.
  • Familiarity with git or other such version control software.
  • Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to work in a fast-paced environment.
  • Strong communication skills with the ability to effectively collaborate with cross-functional teams.
  • Should have a Research Oriented Approach with strong Logical thinking.

Additional skills

  • Knowledge of authentication and authorization mechanisms (e.g., OAuth, JWT).
  • Familiarity with Agile methodologies and software development lifecycle.
  • Familiarity with other mainstream programming languages such as Python, Java, or C++.
  • Excellent analytical and multitasking skills

Important information

  • Location: Sector 125 Noida, UP - 201303
  • Preferable Experience: 1-2 years
  • No. of Vacancies: 1

Application Closed

searchInput.position: frontend developer, backend developer , generative ai

json.company: Visa Consolidated Support Services (India) Private Limited - Tech Unit
json.description:
About Us
Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.

At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.

Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.

Job Description

Tink, delivering Open Banking Solutions as a part of Visa, is building an open banking platform that enables banks, fintech and startups to develop data-driven financial services. Through one API, Tink allows customers to access aggregated financial data, initiate payments, enrich transactions and build personal finance management tools. Tink connects to more than 3,400 banks that reach over 250 million bank customers across Europe & US. Our solutions are ready-to-go products, each developed to solve specific problems and bring value to both businesses and their customers.

As part of the initiative, we are building Visa’s Open Banking engineering team in Bangalore—designed from the ground up to be AI-first. Every engineer in this team will work in close collaboration with Generative AI agents as development companions, leveraging Visa’s extensive portfolio of AI models, tools, and experimentation platforms. This AI-augmented approach will supercharge every stage of the engineering lifecycle—from solution design and code generation to testing, deployment, monitoring, and continual service improvement—enabling us to deliver innovative, high-quality connectivity solutions at unprecedented speed and scale.

Role Overview:

As a Senior Software Engineer in this team, you will:

Build high-performance, scalable APIs integrating with both documented and undocumented banking interfaces.
Co-develop integrations / features side-by-side with GenAI agents to dramatically increase speed-to-market and code quality.
Operate in a true DevOps model—owning build, deploy, and maintain responsibilities in the cloud.
Continuously experiment with Visa’s rich portfolio of Generative AI models (transformers, LLMs, GANs, VAEs, multimodal models) and cutting-edge AI tools for production and innovation.
Deliver new features on a rapid cadence (every few days) with end-to-end accountability.

What You Will Do:

AI-Powered Development:

Partner with GenAI agents for code generation, refactoring, and automated testing.
Experiment in Visa’s AI sandbox, where multiple GenAI models and frameworks are available for employee-driven innovation.
Apply Generative AI models to API integration challenges, anomaly detection, and intelligent automation.

Open Banking Integrations:

Build components integrating with banks’ APIs to aggregate and enrich consumer financial data.
Handle high-load systems with stringent uptime requirements.
Work with Visa’s Tink technologies stack: Java, Node.js, JavaScript, AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, SQL, Datadog and much more.

Cloud-Native DevOps:

Own end-to-end delivery: design, build, deploy, monitor, and maintain services in AWS/Kubernetes/Docker environments.
Implement CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure-as-code, and automated observability using Datadog and related tooling.
Participate in on-call rotations to ensure high availability and operational excellence.

Collaboration & Mentorship:

Coach junior engineers, especially in leveraging AI engineering assistants.
Contribute to AI-first engineering culture—sharing learnings from model experimentation.

This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in office will be confirmed by your hiring manager.

Qualifications

We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer with experience of building innovative and scalable products. You understand the trade-offs of speed vs quality on technical decisions and look at problems from different angles. You also invest time in your own, and the team's development to build up your overall knowledge.

We would like you to have:

Bachelor degree in Computer Science or related field and at least 2-8 years of Software Development Experience.
Extensive experience working with Java, Node.js and Javascript

Experience with Generative AI:

Understanding of transformers, GANs, VAEs, and other generative architectures.
Application of NLP, multimodal AI, and AI-powered developer tools in production systems.
Practical exposure to prompt engineering and tooling orchestration for AI agents in enterprise environments, ensuring reproducibility and compliance.

Experience with cloud-native DevOps:

AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure-as-code
Experience in agile product-centric environments with rapid iteration cycles.

Nice-to-have:

Operational excellence & incident response experience.
Financial API integration experience.
Experience mentoring engineers in AI-assisted development.

Visa is an EEO Employer

Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

json.description:
Come work at a place where innovation and teamwork come together to support the most exciting missions in the world!

Location: Pune (Hybrid mode)

Position Type: Full-time

Experience: 1–3 years as a full stack or backend-focused developer

Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field

About Us

Qualys is a leading provider of information security and compliance cloud solutions. We are looking for a passionate Software Engineer to join our engineering team and contribute to building high-quality, scalable, and secure software products.

Requirements

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
1–3 years of hands-on experience in software development (full stack or backend).
Good knowledge of Java, Spring, Spring Boot, and relational databases (Oracle preferred).
Basic to intermediate experience with front-end technologies such as React.js, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Understanding of software development methodologies—Agile experience is a plus.
Familiarity with cloud environments and services is an added advantage.
Exposure to Docker or Kubernetes is a plus.
Strong analytical and debugging skills with the ability to learn quickly.
Good communication, teamwork, and problem-solving abilities.

Responsibilities

Develop, enhance, and maintain software applications using Java, Spring Boot, Oracle, React.js, HTML, and CSS.
Work with senior engineers and cross-functional teams to design and implement new features.
Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code following standard coding practices.
Participate in code reviews, testing, and debugging to ensure high-quality release cycles.
Assist in building scalable and responsive front-end and back-end components.
Collaborate with product managers and stakeholders to understand requirements and translate them into technical tasks.
Stay updated with new technologies and contribute to continuous improvement of the codebase and processes.

Benefits

Competitive salary and benefits package
Opportunities for continuous learning and career development
Collaborative, dynamic, and growth-oriented work environment

searchInput.position: frontend developer, backend developer , generative ai

json.description:
About HighLevel:
HighLevel is an AI-powered business operating system that gives agencies, entrepreneurs and SMBs the infrastructure to build, automate and scale. Today, HighLevel supports SMBs across 150+ countries, fueling community-driven growth rooted in real customer outcomes.
To date, businesses operating on HighLevel have generated over $7 billion in ecosystem value, demonstrating the impact of shared infrastructure at scale. By centralizing conversations, automation and intelligence into one system, we help businesses move faster, reduce complexity and execute efficiently.
Behind the platform, HighLevel powers more than 4 billion API hits and 2.5 billion message events daily. With 250 terabytes of distributed data, 250+ microservices and over 1 million domain names supported, our architecture is built for performance, resilience and long-term scalability.

Our people
With over 2,000 team members across 10+ countries, HighLevel operates as a global, remote-first organization built for speed and ownership. We value initiative, clarity and execution, creating space for ambitious people to build systems that support millions of businesses worldwide. Here, innovation thrives, ideas are celebrated and people come first, no matter where they call home.

Our impact
Every month, HighLevel enables more than 1.5 billion messages, 200 million leads and 20 million conversations for the more than 1 million businesses we support. Behind those numbers are real people building independence, expanding opportunity and creating measurable impact. We’re proud to be a part of that.
Learn more about us on our YouTube Channel or Blog Posts

About the Role

We’re looking for a strong Software Engineer with a frontend focus to build and scale high-performance scheduling and booking experiences. You’ll work across the stack — primarily on frontend systems like booking widgets and calendar views, while also contributing to APIs and backend integrations that power them.

This role requires strong execution, end-to-end ownership, and the ability to navigate ambiguity while delivering scalable, reliable systems.

Responsibilities:

Build and ship high-quality frontend features using Vue.js and Nuxt

Own projects end-to-end: requirements design implementation testing deployment monitoring

Develop performant, responsive, and accessible UI components and booking flows

Optimize frontend performance (SSR, hydration, lazy loading, Core Web Vitals)

Design and integrate with backend APIs for scheduling, availability, and booking workflows

Contribute to backend services where needed (API design, data modeling, performance)

Break down complex problems into clear, actionable tasks and drive them to completion

Collaborate closely with Product, Design, and Backend teams to deliver intuitive user experiences

Proactively identify tech debt and improve system reliability

Requirements:

3–6 years of software engineering experience (frontend-heavy)

Strong proficiency in Vue.js, Nuxt (2 or 3), and modern JavaScript/TypeScript

Solid understanding of browser rendering, performance optimization, and responsive design

Working knowledge of backend systems (APIs, databases, system design fundamentals)

Experience building scalable, maintainable systems across frontend and backend boundaries

Ability to independently drive features from idea to production

How You Work

Operate with ownership: take goals, define the approach, and execute independently

Communicate proactively on progress, risks, and trade-offs

Navigate ambiguity and make pragmatic decisions without waiting for perfect specs

Balance speed with long-term maintainability and scalability

Write clear design docs, PRs, and contribute to thoughtful code reviews

Team Impact

Contribute to improving frontend architecture, performance, and developer experience

Raise the bar on code quality, testing, and best practices

Help drive a culture of ownership, accountability, and continuous improvement

Why Join Us?

Build high-scale, high-impact systems used in real-world workflows

Own problems end-to-end across frontend and backend

Work in a fast-moving, high-ownership environment

Tackle complex product and engineering challenges with real user impact

#LI-Remote #LI-RK1

EEO Statement:

The company is an Equal Opportunity Employer. As an employer subject to affirmative action regulations, we invite you to voluntarily provide the following demographic information. This information is used solely for compliance with government recordkeeping, reporting, and other legal requirements. Providing this information is voluntary and refusal to do so will not affect your application status. This data will be kept separate from your application and will not be used in the hiring decision.

We encourage you to review our Privacy Policy before submitting your application

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

json.description:
*instinctools is a software development company that provides custom software solutions for businesses of all sizes. Our team works closely with clients to understand their specific needs and provide personalized solutions that meet their business requirements.

Our team is looking for a Fullstack (Python/Go + React) Developer for one of our clients.

Our customer is one of the TOP-5 global management consulting firms considered to be among the most prestigious ones in the world. Hundreds of customers from Fortune-500, including the largest global financial institutions, the world’s top media companies, technology companies and federal government agencies rely on our client’s proven platform and services.

The project is an AI-powered assistant for private equity investors that transforms secure data-room documents into a searchable conversational knowledge base.

Location: India (office work)

Working time zone: From 11 am till 8 pm IST

Responsibilities and tasks:

System Design: Architect and develop robust, scalable microservices and APIs using Go, Python and JavaScript.
Frontend Excellence: Lead the development of responsive and performant user interfaces using React and modern JavaScript (ES6+).
Database Management: Design, optimize, and manage data models across both relational (PostgreSQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB) databases.
API Development: Build and integrate secure RESTful and/or GraphQL APIs to ensure seamless communication between client and server.
Code Quality: Conduct rigorous code reviews, provide constructive feedback, and advocate for engineering best practices like CI/CD and automated testing.
Reliability: Monitor application health, troubleshoot production issues, and optimize for maximum speed and scalability.

Our expectations of the candidate:

Solid background in software engineering with hands-on experience in full-stack development.
Backend: Strong proficiency in Python (e.g., FastAPI, Django) or Go, with experience building high-concurrency systems.
Frontend: Advanced skills in React and JavaScript, including state management (Redux or Context API).React and JavaScript,
Databases: Practical experience with PostgreSQL (schema design, query optimization) and MongoDB.
Infrastructure: Hands-on experience with containerization (Docker) and cloud platforms such as AWS.
Tools & Practices: Familiarity with modern development workflows, including Git, CI/CD pipelines, and AI-assisted tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot).
English: Upper-Intermediate

Soft skills:

Highly proactive – ability to figure out who to reach out to and how to get things done independently.
Stakeholder management – comfortable interacting with various stakeholders, from senior developers to product managers.
Curious mindset – challenges existing processes and looks for continuous improvement.
Strong communication – able to have project-related conversations with product managers and other team members.
Time management – organized and reliable.

We offer:

Flexible working time.
Professional and ambitious team.
Transparent system of professional and career development.
Learning opportunities, seminars and conferences and time for exploring new technologies.
The opportunity to realize your potential outside the projects: we arrange meetups and conferences where our staff can perform, develop professional communities.
Co-funding for language courses (English).

Join us and be part of a team that is changing the world through technology.

Important Notice Regarding Your Personal Data Security

At *instinctools, we take the security of your personal data very seriously. Please be informed that all official communication, offers, and correspondence from *instinctools are conducted only through our verified company resources, including:

Official Email Domain: @instinctools.com
Company Website: https://www.instinctools.com

Important Reminder:
*instinctools will NEVER ask for sensitive personal or financial information, including:

– Passwords or PINs

Your trust and security are our top priorities. For any questions, always verify through our official channels.

• instinctools is a software development company that provides custom software solutions for businesses of all sizes. Our team works closely with clients to understand their specific needs and provide personalized solutions that meet their business requirements.

Our team is looking for a Fullstack (Python/Go + React) Developer for one of our clients.

Our customer is one of the TOP-5 global management consulting firms considered to be among the most prestigious ones in the world. Hundreds of customers from Fortune-500, including the largest global financial institutions, the world’s top media companies, technology companies and federal government agencies rely on our client’s proven platform and services.

The project is an AI-powered assistant for private equity investors that transforms secure data-room documents into a searchable conversational knowledge base.

Location: India (office work)


Working time zone: From 11 am till 8 pm IST

Responsibilities and tasks:

  • System Design: Architect and develop robust, scalable microservices and APIs using Go, Python and JavaScript.
  • Frontend Excellence: Lead the development of responsive and performant user interfaces using React and modern JavaScript (ES6+).
  • Database Management: Design, optimize, and manage data models across both relational (PostgreSQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB) databases.
  • API Development: Build and integrate secure RESTful and/or GraphQL APIs to ensure seamless communication between client and server.
  • Code Quality: Conduct rigorous code reviews, provide constructive feedback, and advocate for engineering best practices like CI/CD and automated testing.
    Reliability: Monitor application health, troubleshoot production issues, and optimize for maximum speed and scalability.


Our expectations of the candidate:

  • Solid background in software engineering with hands-on experience in full-stack development.
  • Backend: Strong proficiency in Python (e.g., FastAPI, Django) or Go, with experience building high-concurrency systems.
  • Frontend: Advanced skills in React and JavaScript, including state management (Redux or Context API).React and JavaScript,
  • Databases: Practical experience with PostgreSQL (schema design, query optimization) and MongoDB.
  • Infrastructure: Hands-on experience with containerization (Docker) and cloud platforms such as AWS.
  • Tools & Practices: Familiarity with modern development workflows, including Git, CI/CD pipelines, and AI-assisted tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot).
  • English: Upper-Intermediate

Soft skills:

  • Highly proactive – ability to figure out who to reach out to and how to get things done independently.
  • Stakeholder management – comfortable interacting with various stakeholders, from senior developers to product managers.
  • Curious mindset – challenges existing processes and looks for continuous improvement.
  • Strong communication – able to have project-related conversations with product managers and other team members.
  • Time management – organized and reliable.

We offer:

  • Flexible working time.
  • Professional and ambitious team.
  • Transparent system of professional and career development.
  • Learning opportunities, seminars and conferences and time for exploring new technologies.
  • The opportunity to realize your potential outside the projects: we arrange meetups and conferences where our staff can perform, develop professional communities.
  • Co-funding for language courses (English).

Join us and be part of a team that is changing the world through technology.

json.description:
Hi, I'm Rita Dias, your Recruiter and guide to joining CSG! We are excited to learn more about you and your unique background.

The Software Development Engineers design, develop, test, and maintain software applications or systems. They collaborate with cross-functional teams to create efficient and reliable software solutions, ensuring they meet project requirements and industry standards. Responsibilities may also include troubleshooting issues, optimizing code, and staying updated with emerging technologies.

We are looking for a Sr Software Developer who will:

Design, build, and operate AWS-based backend and full-stack services (API Gateway, Lambda, ECS/EKS, SQS/SNS, S3, RDS/DynamoDB).

Develop RESTful and event-driven services plus responsive SPAs in Angular/React.

Ensure performance, security, observability, and reliability in a 24x7 environment; participate in on-call.

Collaborate with product, architecture, QA, and DevOps on design, estimation, and iterative delivery.

Uphold high standards in code quality, testing, and maintainability.

Is this opportunity right for you? We are looking for candidates who have:

4–7 years of software development experience.

Strong C#/.NET (ASP.NET Core, Web APIs); willingness to work in Java Spring.

Solid AWS experience (compute, integration, data services).

Hands-on Angular or React experience.

Strong OOP, design patterns, data structures, SQL, and Git-based CI/CD.

Clear communication and effectiveness in a remote-first global team.

Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail in a high-availability, mission-critical environment.

Curiosity and growth mindset, comfortable working across both C# and Java and adopting new AWS services and tools.

Direct Java Spring and payments/fintech experience is a nice to have.

Event-driven architectures (SQS/SNS, EventBridge, Kinesis), containers and orchestration is a nice to have.

CSGer Perks & Benefits

Work from Home, in-office, or hybrid

Employee Belonging Groups

Healthcare: Dental, Medical, and Vision

Paid Vacation, Volunteer, and Holiday Time Off

And so much more!

 (https://www.csgi.com/careers/)

Location(s):

India Remote

Accommodation:

If you would like to be considered for employment opportunities with CSG and need special assistance due to a disability or accommodation for a disability throughout any aspect of the application process, please call us at +1 (402) 431-7440 or email us at accommodations@csgi.com. CSG provides accommodations for persons with disabilities in employment, including during the hiring process and any interview and/or testing processes.

Our Guiding Principles:

Impact: Always help and empower others, whether they’re colleagues or customers. When our employees set their minds to something, great things happen.

Integrity: Do what’s right for our customers and our people while being authentic. We treat everyone with trust and respect—that’s just who we are.

Inspiration: Be bold in the way you think and passionate about the work you do. Test out innovative ideas without the fear of failure.

Our Story:

CSG empowers companies to build unforgettable experiences, making it easier for people and businesses to connect with, use and pay for the services they value most. For over 40 years, CSG's technologies and people have helped some of the world's most recognizable brands solve their toughest business challenges and evolve to meet the demands of today's digital economy.

By channeling the power of all, we make ordinary customer and employee experiences extraordinary. Our people [CSGers] are fearlessly committed and connected, high on integrity and low on ego, making us the easiest company to do business with and the best place to work. We power a culture of integrity, innovation, and impact across our locations, representing the most authentic version of ourselves to build a better future together. That's just who we are. Learn more about CSG Inclusion & Impact here.

json.positionName: Member of Technical Staff (MTS) – Core Full-Stack / Backend
json.description:
About Us
We are an AI-first engineering intelligence platform building the future of developer workflows completely from scratch. We are the core engineering team behind Fi, where we built and scaled fintech systems for over 3 million users. We don’t stitch together basic API wrappers; we work directly on deep system architectures. If you want a highly challenging, completely flat environment where you own your vertical without bureaucratic red tape, this is it.

The Role & Technical Depth
We are shifting past static components into high-concurrency, data-heavy production web flows and fully autonomous AI agent systems. We need a stellar engineer who can write high-performance backends and wrap deterministic, bulletproof software around non-deterministic AI outputs.

Build the Stack: Design, develop, and optimize core services, heavy web architectures, and transaction flows for our platform.

Production-Grade AI Agents: Take AI loops out of the "toy project" phase and build the software loops, validation guardrails, and caching mechanisms required to run them reliably at scale.

Performance Engineering: Diagnose and resolve complex backend bottlenecks, database deadlocks, and high-concurrency latency spikes.

Our Expected Stack: Go (Golang) or high-performance backend equivalents, relational/non-relational databases, Redis cache/queuing systems, and modern, highly optimized web engineering frameworks.

Who You Are
Experience: 3–4 years of intensive full-stack or backend engineering experience.
Startup DNA: Proven track record in high-velocity tech startups with heavy execution demands. You excel in ambiguous environments where the destination is clear but the map is yet to be drawn.
Strong Fundamentals: You know how to build software that scales. You understand memory management, concurrency primitives, asynchronous task processing, and how web protocols actually break under load.
Selection Process : Once you apply via the career page, we will reach out to set up a first round of technical interview, followed by 2/3 rounds of interviews with leadership & key stakeholders. You might be required to attempt a take home technical assignment/excercise which typically takes 3-4 days.

In addition to assessing your technical/coding experience, expect at least 2 rounds to assess your communication & articulation ability, general aptitude, attitude and cultural fitment.

We aspire to create an inclusive culture of diverse people not just because it's the right thing to do but because heterogeneity inspires us and is more fun! We employ people solely on merit and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant because of race, creed, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity/expression, national origin, disability, age, genetic information, marital status, pregnancy or related condition (including breastfeeding), or any other basis protected by law.
We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

json.description:
Key Responsibilities
Requirement Understanding & Clarification: Work closely with stakeholders to understand requirements clearly, ask the right questions, and convert needs into well-defined technical tasks.
End-to-End Feature Ownership: Deliver complete solutions single-handedly, including backend, frontend, database, integrations, testing, and deployment support.
Backend Development (Python): Build and maintain scalable backend services, APIs, business logic, and integrations in Python.
Database & SQL: Write efficient SQL queries, optimize database interactions, design schemas when needed, and ensure data integrity and performance.
Frontend Development (Vue.js): Develop responsive, maintainable UI using JavaScript with strong emphasis on Vue.js and component-driven architecture.
Quality & Reliability: Implement unit/integration tests, handle edge cases, debug production issues, and ensure stable releases.
Documentation & Collaboration: Document solutions, APIs, and decisions; collaborate with product/QA/operations as needed to ensure smooth delivery.

Skills and Qualification Required:
Technical Skills required in the order of priority
Python: Strong proficiency building backend services/APIs and business logic
SQL / Database Queries: Strong query writing, optimization, schema understanding
JavaScript (Vue.js): Strong Vue.js development, UI integration with APIs
ROS (Plus): Exposure to ROS is an advantage, not mandatory
Minimum 5+ years in full stack development
Proven ability to work independently and deliver end-to-end
Strong debugging, analytical thinking, and ownership mindset
Able to translate ambiguous requirements into actionable plans
Location: Bangalore.

json.description:
While technology is the heart of our business, a global and diverse culture is the heart of our success. We love our people and we take pride in catering them to a culture built on transparency, diversity, integrity, learning and growth.

If working in an environment that encourages you to innovate and excel, not just in professional but personal life, interests you- you would enjoy your career with Quantiphi!

Role : Senior Software Developer

Experience : 3 to 6 Years
Work Location : Mumbai / Bangalore / Trivandrum

Overview:

We are building scalable Agentic AI platforms, powering 50+ enterprise use cases using LLM-based agents. We’re looking for a Senior Software Developer with strong backend (Python), DevOps, and AI integration skills to help build robust services, APIs, and front-end components that enable agent execution, orchestration, and user interaction.

Job Responsibilities:

Lead design and development of scalable backend services & APIs using Python and FastAPI.

Optimize data models for relational (PostgreSQL, MySQL) & NoSQL databases.

Develop resilient asynchronous data pipelines, event-driven systems, and caching (Redis).

Develop intuitive UI components for agent configuration & visualization (JavaScript and React).

Structure and style internal interfaces effectively (HTML5, CSS3).

Spearhead integration of LLMs (OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, HuggingFace, Nvidia NIMs) for autonomous agents.

Design and refine advanced RAG pipelines and Vector DBs (Milvus, PGVector, Pinecone).

Champion prompt engineering, agentic frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex), and tool-calling.

Drive robust DevOps practices: expert Git, Docker, and CI/CD pipeline implementation.

Promote agile methodologies, conduct code reviews, and maintain high-quality documentation.

Collaborate with cross-functional teams (product, ML, design) to deliver technical solutions.

Mentor junior engineers, contribute to technical strategy, and drive innovation.

Job Requirements:

Back-End Development (Required) -

Expert in Python with production experience architecting and developing scalable backend services using FastAPI for high-performance RESTful APIs and WebSocket-based communication.

Proficient in leveraging ORMs, designing robust relational database schemas (PostgreSQL, MySQL), and effectively utilizing caching mechanisms like Redis.

Working knowledge of system integration patterns and non-relational database technologies (e.g., MongoDB, Cassandra) for specific use cases within the AI platform.

DevOps & Software Engineering Practices (Required) -

Expert in version control with Git and containerization using Docker.

Strong experience in designing, implementing, and advocating for comprehensive unit tests and other automated testing strategies; commitment to TDD/BDD principles is highly desirable.

Proficient in agile development methodologies and conducting thorough, constructive code reviews.

If you like wild growth and working with happy, enthusiastic over-achievers, you'll enjoy your career with us!

json.description:
Client Type: Product Company

Job Type: Full-Time With Client

Work Mode: Hybrid

Location: Hyderabad

Experience: 6-9 Years

Skills: Node.js, RESTful API, Typescript, SQL, AWS / GCP

This is a full-time opportunity with our client, a fast-growing healthcare technology company focused on improving health outcomes through innovative digital healthcare and wellness solutions. Their platform serves millions of users by delivering personalized healthcare experiences, scalable digital services, and data-driven technology solutions across the healthcare ecosystem.

Job Overview

As a Back-End Engineer, you will play a key role in building and managing scalable backend systems that support both our diverse user base and healthcare professionals delivering personalized nutrition guidance. Your responsibilities will include designing reliable databases, developing efficient data processing solutions, and integrating multiple systems to ensure secure and seamless data flow. Your expertise in backend engineering, data management, and system integration will help strengthen the core of our platform and contribute to improving health outcomes through technology-driven solutions.

You Will

Design, develop, and maintain backend systems powering the web application.
Collaborate with frontend engineers to build and enhance scalable APIs aligned with business requirements.
Follow engineering best practices including code reviews, testing, and performance optimization to ensure high-quality development standards.
Work closely with product and business teams to understand user requirements and translate them into efficient backend solutions.
Troubleshoot and resolve application, server-side, and database-related issues.
Continuously monitor, improve, and optimize system performance, reliability, and scalability.
Stay updated with emerging technologies and recommend improvements for current and future backend platforms.

You Have

5+ years of experience in backend development using technologies such as JavaScript, TypeScript, or Node.js.
Strong experience in designing and developing RESTful APIs with focus on scalability and performance.
Good understanding of relational and NoSQL databases including MySQL, PostgreSQL, and DynamoDB. Exposure to cloud data warehouses like Amazon Redshift is an added advantage.
Hands-on experience with AWS services such as Lambda, SQS, RDS, and EC2.
Exposure to low-code platforms like Retool is a plus.
Experience with Docker and containerized application environments such as Kubernetes.
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science or a related discipline.

json.description:
iGaming:
If it’s iGaming, we know a thing or two. At Light & Wonder, It’s all about the games, and our digital team leads the global iGaming market, providing jaw-dropping content and innovative software that powers the world's most successful online gaming providers.

Position Summary

About Company

Light & Wonder is a global leader in game experiences. We create content, hardware and systems that connect iconic titles across any place or channel. By turning games into expansive entertainment, we keep thrilling players with characters and stories they can’t get enough of.

Light & Wonder, Inc. is the leading cross-platform global games company. Through our three unique, yet highly complementary business segments, we deliver unforgettable experiences by combining the exceptional talents of our 7,500+ member team, with a deep understanding of our customers and players. We create immersive content that forges lasting connections with players, wherever they choose to engage. At Light & Wonder, it’s all about the games. The Company is committed to the highest standards of integrity, from promoting player responsibility to implementing sustainable practices. To learn more visit www.lnw.com .

We are committed to offering very competitive benefits that are aligned with our values and inspire employees to drive innovation and contribute to the organization’s performance. Employees are the most valued resource, and we always look to improve their well-being with a wide range of benefits befitting every individual. Not limited to monetary benefits, we have robust learning and development opportunities that help them to grow professionally.

Our Values

Dare to be bold: We combine diverse talent to look at the familiar in unfamiliar ways.

Celebrate perspectives - We combine diverse talent to look at the familiar in unfamiliar ways

Never settle: We relentlessly push forward to create the extraordinary in every detail.

Uphold integrity: We promote accountability and respect to raise the bar for ourselves and the industry.

Win as a team: We bring out the best in each other to share collective success.

Senior Back-End Software Engineer- Java

Job Location: Commerzone IT Tech Park, Yerwada - Pune.

Required Experience: 6-10 years

Employment Type: Full-time

Education:

BE/B.Tech in Computer Science, IT, or related field

MCA (Computer Science/Application)

Key Responsibilities

Design, develop, and enhance microservice-based backend systems using Java, Spring Boot, and Hibernate/JPA.

Collaborate closely with product and architecture teams to design scalable and fault-tolerant systems.

Build, test, and maintain RESTful APIs for high-performance applications.

Work with relational databases (MySǪL, PostgreSǪL) — design schemas, optimize queries, and ensure data consistency.

Implement unit and integration tests to ensure product reliability and maintain high code quality.

Participate in code reviews, design discussions, and architectural decisions.

Deploy and monitor applications in cloud environments (AWS).

Identify performance bottlenecks and optimize system performance.

Contribute to continuous improvement of product architecture, automation, and development processes.

Required Skills

6–9 years of experience in Java backend development.

Strong understanding of Core Java (OOPs, Collections, Streams, Exception Handling, Multi-threading).

Deep experience with Spring, Spring Boot, JPA/Hibernate.

Hands-on experience with REST APIs and microservice design patterns.

Proficiency in MySǪL or PostgreSǪL, including performance tuning and query optimization.

Strong understanding of software design principles (SOLID, Clean Code).

Experience with unit testing frameworks like JUnit and Mockito.

Familiarity with AWS services (EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, etc.).

Good experience with Git, Maven/Gradle, and CI/CD pipelines.

Exposure to Agile methodologies and product lifecycle development.

Good to Have

Exposure to Docker or other containerisation tools.

Familiarity with frontend frameworks like reactjs, Javascript, HTML, CSS

Experience with SonarǪube, JaCoCo, or similar code quality tools.

Basic understanding of DevOps pipelines.

Soft Skills

Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.

Product-oriented mindset with focus on scalability and user impact.

Excellent collaboration and communication skills.

Ownership-driven and proactive attitude towards challenges.

Qualifications
