json.description:
Sr. Front End Engineer@ PEOPLE10

Experience: 5 - 6 years

Job Location: Bangalore (Remote)

Job Overview:

This position is for a technical position with Angular knowledge for the complete system rewrites of Logistics related Project at Laufer group International. They will be functioning as a front end software engineer and be involved in the design, analysis, new development, coding, unit testing and will interact with the project manager, QA, User Group as well other team members within the organization. Global logistics knowledge would be a major plus.

Roles & Responsibilities

Software development of Angular v13-18+ applications

Software design and review plus strong knowledge of the full SDLC

Requirement’s definition and analysis.

Investigation and root cause analysis of software and system defects

What We’re Looking For

Bachelor or master’s in computer science, or equivalent experience or qualification

5+ years of engineering experience with Angular, particularly v13-18+

Expert knowledge of Angular, TypeScript, JavaScript and RxJS

Expert knowledge of REST APIs and security practices

Expert ability to create responsive cross-browser compatible HTML5/SCSS templates

Working knowledge of SCM tools including Git, JIRA

Proven ability to work independently with limited supervision

Excellent team player with the ability to work within a collaborative environment

Creative, resourceful, and innovative problem solver

Great communication skills, including active listening and comprehending system requirements

Desired Skills for Sr. Front End Engineer:

Prior hands-on experience with NG Bootstrap and Ag-Grid

Experience with an IDE such as Eclipse, IBM Liberty

Spring Framework, Core Java, JSP, JSTL

Familiar with SQL, SOA, DB2, JDBC

Self-taught and self-teaching, with a demonstrated aptitude for acquiring knowledge and skills

Why Join People10?

At People10, you will be immersed in an exceptional work environment surrounded by helpful colleagues and a workplace where feedback flows freely. If you’re looking to make an impact, People10 is the place for you. People10 is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome and encourage diversity in the workplace regardless of race, gender, religion, age, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or veteran status. Our culture of open door policy, constant connection with leadership team, opportunities for skill development through diversified learning initiatives like code combat, meetups, knowledge booster sessions makes People10 an rewarding place to work.At People10, we don’t just build software, but we also build careers. You will be: Be part of a growing, design-led digital transformation firm solving real tech problems.

 Collaborate with smart, driven teammates across geographies.

 Enjoy autonomy, creative freedom, and the opportunity to make a visible impact.

 Learn, upskill, and lead — we believe in growing people alongside platforms.

We would love to meet you if you are ready to take initiative and make your mark in a high-impact marketing role.

About People10:

People10 is a new-age 'Agile and Lean Product Engineering’ firm that empowers businesses to be fast-and

fail-proof through state-of-the-art IT solutions. We craft custom solutions in web, mobile, cloud and data analytics using rapid agile and lean engineering methods and productivity frameworks.

 Great Place to Work® Certified - 2024-2025.

 Great Place to Work® Certified - 2023-2024.

 Great Place to Work® Certified - 2022-2023.

 Rated Best Software Development Agency in New York City - Expertise (2021)

 Rated Top Software Development Company - Clutch, New York (2020)

 Rated Top Software Development Company - Clutch, New York (2019)

 60+ clients and 350+ projects

 250+ employees, and expanding quickly

 A work environment that inspires people to collaborate and do great work on cutting edge technologies

 For more information, please visit www.people10.com

Our culture of open door policy, constant connection with leadership team, opportunities for skill development through diversified learning initiatives like code combat, meetups, knowledge booster sessions makes People10 an rewarding place to work.At People10, we don’t just build software, but we also build careers. You will be: Be part of a growing, design-led digital transformation firm solving real tech problems.

  • Collaborate with smart, driven teammates across geographies.
  • Enjoy autonomy, creative freedom, and the opportunity to make a visible impact.
  • Learn, upskill, and lead — we believe in growing people alongside platforms.
We would love to meet you if you are ready to take initiative and make your mark in a high-impact marketing role.
About People10:
People10 is a new-age 'Agile and Lean Product Engineering’ firm that empowers businesses to be fast-and
fail-proof through state-of-the-art IT solutions. We craft custom solutions in web, mobile, cloud and data analytics using rapid agile and lean engineering methods and productivity frameworks.
  • Great Place to Work® Certified - 2024-2025.
  • Great Place to Work® Certified - 2023-2024.
  • Great Place to Work® Certified - 2022-2023.
  • Rated Best Software Development Agency in New York City - Expertise (2021)
  • Rated Top Software Development Company - Clutch, New York (2020)
  • Rated Top Software Development Company - Clutch, New York (2019)
  • 60+ clients and 350+ projects
  • 250+ employees, and expanding quickly
  • A work environment that inspires people to collaborate and do great work on cutting edge technologies
For more information, please visit www.people10.com

json.description:
Why Valtech? We’re advisors, visionaries, creative and techies. We embrace all things digital. We talk to each other. We have fun. We love our clients. We’re looking ahead • We are global
Why Valtech? We’re the experience innovation company - a trusted partner to the world’s most recognized brands. To our people we offer growth opportunities, a values-driven culture, international careers and the chance to shape the future of experience.

The opportunity

At Valtech, you’ll find an environment designed for continuous learning, meaningful impact, and professional growth. Whether you're pioneering new digital solutions, challenging conventional thinking or building the next generation of customer experiences, your work will help transform industries.

We are proud of:

The work we do and the innovation we drive
Our values of share, care and dare
A workplace culture that fosters creativity, diversity and autonomy
Our borderless, global framework, which enables seamless collaboration

The Role

As an AI Developer you are passionate about experience innovation and eager to push the boundaries of what’s possible. You bring 2+ years of experience, a growth mindset and a drive to make a lasting impact.

You will thrive in this role if you are:

A curious problem solver who challenges the status quo
A collaborator who values teamwork and knowledge-sharing
Excited by the intersection of technology, creativity and data
Experienced in Agile methodologies and consulting (a plus)

Role & Responsibilities

1. Strong experience in frontend development using ReactJS and Next.js
 Solid backend engineering skills in Python (FastAPI) with working knowledge of NodeJS or NestJS
2. Hands-on experience with AI and LLM-based systems, including embeddings, intelligent analysis, and private or offline AI setups
3. Experience with vector databases such as OpenSearch or Chroma for similarity search and RAG-based solutions
4. Practical exposure to model evaluation, response accuracy tuning, and hallucination reduction techniques
5. Strong understanding of data handling using PostgreSQL and object storage platforms such as Azure Blob Storage, Azure Data Lake, or MinIO for structured and unstructured data
6. Ability to analyze data, build KPIs, and derive actionable insights using SQL and Python
7. Familiarity with Git, CI/CD pipelines, security best practices, and enterprise-grade system design
8. Strong problem-solving mindset with the ability to translate complex technical solutions into measurable business value

Nice to Have

1. Experience with AI workflows such as RAG, agent-based systems, LLM-driven integrations, and scalable AI pipelines

2. Exposure to private or offline AI setups, including local LLM deployments

3. Strong backend experience using Python with FastAPI for building AI services and APIs

4. Frontend exposure using ReactJS / Next.js for AI-driven user interfaces

5. Good understanding of PostgreSQL and object storage platforms such as Azure Blob Storage, Azure Data Lake, or MinIO

6. Experience building KPIs, dashboards, and insights using SQL and Python

7. Background in Retail, Digital, or large-scale enterprise platforms

8. Ability to explain complex AI and technical concepts in a simple, business-friendly manner

If you do not meet all the listed qualifications or have gaps in your experience, we still encourage you to apply. At Valtech, we recognize that talent comes in many forms, and we value diverse perspectives and a willingness to learn.

Commitment to reaching all kinds of people

We design experiences that work for all kinds of people - and that starts with our own teams. At Valtech, we’re intentional about building an inclusive culture where everyone feels supported to grow, thrive and achieve their goals. No matter your background, you belong here. Explore our Diversity & Inclusion site to see how we’re creating a more equitable Valtech for all.

 The Benefits

This is a Full-Time position based in Bengaluru.

Beyond a competitive compensation package, we offer:

Flexibility, with hybrid work options (country-dependent)
Learning and development, with access to cutting-edge tools, training and industry experts.

Our benefits are tailored to each location. Your Talent Partner will provide full details during the hiring process.

Your application process

Once you apply, our Talent Acquisition team will review your application. If your skills and experience align with the role, we’ll reach out for next steps.

 ️ Beware of recruitment fraud: Only engage with official Valtech email addresses ending in @valtech.com.

We are committed to inclusion and accessibility. If you need reasonable accommodations during the interview process, please either indicate it in your application or let your Talent Partner know.

About Valtech

Valtech is the experience innovation company that exists to unlock a better way to experience the world. By blending crafts, categories, and cultures, we help brands unlock new value in an increasingly digital world.

At the intersection of data, AI, creativity, and technology, we drive transformation for leading organizations, including L’Oréal, Mars, Audi, P&G, Volkswagen Dolby, and more.

At Valtech, we don’t just talk about transformation. We make it happen. Our people are the heart of our success, and we foster a workplace where everyone has the support to thrive, grow and innovate.

Are you ready to create what’s next? Join us.

json.description:
Company Overview

Docusign brings agreements to life. Over 1.5 million customers and more than a billion people in over 180 countries use Docusign solutions to accelerate the process of doing business and simplify people’s lives. With intelligent agreement management, Docusign unleashes business-critical data that is trapped inside of documents. Until now, these were disconnected from business systems of record, costing businesses time, money, and opportunity. Using Docusign’s Intelligent Agreement Management platform, companies can create, commit, and manage agreements with solutions created by the #1 company in e-signature and contract lifecycle management (CLM).

What You'll Do

We’re looking for passionate and talented Software Engineers to build out the machine learning platform and infrastructure that will power Docusign’s IAM. You will help support all aspects of the machine learning lifecycle, specifically areas like data storage, annotation, training systems, and telemetry infrastructure. Our team is responsible for building a platform that supports a team of machine learning engineers and data scientists and can serve AI solutions to Docusign at scale. This role will be a part of the AI platform team at Docusign, which builds analytics products that utilize AI, machine learning, and cutting-edge deep learning based models to provide insights for the Docusign IAM. Our team is distributed across the San Francisco/Bay Area, Seattle, Ireland and India and you will be working collaboratively across these teams.

This position is an individual contributor role reporting to the Senior Manager, Software Engineering - AI Platform.

Responsibility
Design, implement, and maintain backend and platform services that power Docusign’s AI and Insight capabilities for Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM)
Build and enhance components across the machine learning lifecycle, including data ingestion and storage, feature/label pipelines, annotation tooling, training workflows, and model serving infrastructure
Develop reliable, secure, and scalable RESTful services and APIs that expose AI-powered insights and analytics to internal product teams and customer-facing applications
Contribute to service observability by adding metrics, logging, dashboards, and alerts while participating in incident triage and root cause analysis to improve system reliability
Apply cutting-edge AI tools to write clean, well-tested code, participating in code reviews, following team engineering best practices for design, testing, and deployment, and continuously adapting to new technologies
Collaborate closely with machine learning engineers, data scientists, and other backend teams to translate requirements into robust platform and product features
Work as part of a distributed team across time zones, communicating clearly and documenting decisions to ensure alignment and smooth handoffs
Learn and adopt new technologies continuously in AI platforms, data systems, and backend engineering to improve performance, reliability, and developer experience
Demonstrate strong curiosity about emerging AI capabilities and industry trends, proactively exploring how they can be applied to our platform and products
Challenge the status quo by questioning existing designs and processes and proposing innovative, AI-driven solutions that improve developer experience and customer value
Look for opportunities to apply AI thoughtfully in every phase of development—from design and implementation to testing, deployment, and operations—to deliver better outcomes for our customers

Job Designation

Hybrid:
Employee divides their time between in-office and remote work. Access to an office location is required. (Frequency: Minimum 2 days per week; may vary by team but will be weekly in-office expectation)

Positions at Docusign are assigned a job designation of either In Office, Hybrid or Remote and are specific to the role/job. Preferred job designations are not guaranteed when changing positions within Docusign. Docusign reserves the right to change a position's job designation depending on business needs and as permitted by local law.

What You Bring

Basic
2+ years of professional software engineering experience building backend or platform services in a production environment (or equivalent internship/industry experience)
Proficiency in at least one modern programming language used for backend development (for example, Java, C#, Go, or TypeScript/Node.js) and familiarity with object-oriented and/or functional design principles
Experience developing and debugging services that interact with databases or data stores (SQL or NoSQL) and external APIs
Experience with unit, integration, and end-to-end testing, and with using version control and modern CI/CD pipelines
Understanding of core distributed systems concepts such as scalability, reliability, latency, and fault tolerance
Preferred
Experience building or supporting components of an AI or machine learning platform (for example, data pipelines, feature stores, training orchestration, model serving, or experimentation frameworks)
Experience designing and operating cloud-native services (for example, Kubernetes, Docker, serverless functions, or managed data and messaging services)
Familiarity with observability tools and practices (metrics, logs, traces, and dashboards) and with on-call or incident response processes
Experience working with large-scale data processing frameworks or streaming systems (such as Spark, Flink, Kafka, or similar)
Exposure to machine learning concepts and workflows, and comfort partnering with ML engineers and data scientists to productionize models
Experience with secure coding practices and building services that comply with privacy, security, and compliance standards
Prior experience in SaaS or enterprise platforms, especially analytics or developer platforms
Strong problem-solving skills, a willingness to dive into unfamiliar areas across the stack, and a learning mindset
Effective communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work with cross-functional partners in a distributed team environment

Life At Docusign

Working here

Docusign is committed to building trust and making the world more agreeable for our employees, customers and the communities in which we live and work. You can count on us to listen, be honest, and try our best to do what’s right, every day. At Docusign, everything is equal.

We each have a responsibility to ensure every team member has an equal opportunity to succeed, to be heard, to exchange ideas openly, to build lasting relationships, and to do the work of their life. Best of all, you will be able to feel deep pride in the work you do, because your contribution helps us make the world better than we found it. And for that, you’ll be loved by us, our customers, and the world in which we live.

Accommodation

Docusign is committed to providing reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities in our job application procedures. If you need such an accommodation, or a religious accommodation, during the application process, please contact us at accommodations@docusign.com.

If you experience any issues, concerns, or technical difficulties during the application process please get in touch with our Talent organization at taops@docusign.com for assistance.

json.positionName: Staff IT Software Engineer, Full Stack (Java / React / GCP AI)
json.description:
Bengaluru, Karnataka, India IT Ref ID: JR-017892

Our Mission

At Palo Alto Networks®, we’re united by a shared mission—to protect our digital way of life. We thrive at the intersection of innovation and impact, solving real-world problems with cutting-edge technology and bold thinking. Here, everyone has a voice, and every idea counts. If you’re ready to do the most meaningful work of your career alongside people who are just as passionate as you are, you’re in the right place.

Who We Are

In order to be the cybersecurity partner of choice, we must trailblaze the path and shape the future of our industry. This is something our employees work at each day and is defined by our values: Disruption, Collaboration, Execution, Integrity, and Inclusion. We weave AI into the fabric of everything we do and use it to augment the impact every individual can have. If you are passionate about solving real-world problems and ideating beside the best and the brightest, we invite you to join us!

We believe collaboration thrives in person. That’s why most of our teams work from the office full time, with flexibility when it’s needed. This model supports real-time problem-solving, stronger relationships, and the kind of precision that drives great outcomes.

Job Summary

Design, build, and scale highly available, secure backend microservices alongside modern, performance-optimized, and responsive frontends.

Design, orchestrate, and deploy production-ready agentic workflows that leverage LLM

reasoning, prompt engineering, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for independent decision-making and complex task execution.

Develop core full-stack components that interface with Generative AI model deployment and real-time inference systems. Optimize large-scale AI interactions for performance, low latency, and high throughput.

Establish long-term architectural patterns and tooling choices for our Java, Next.js, and Google Cloud ecosystem, preferably GCP Vertex AI or equivalent.

Champion design standards, rigorous type safety, automated testing, and comprehensive monitoring across decoupled repositories, UI components, and AI inference pipelines.

Ensure all full-stack applications and integrated AI systems comply with enterprise security policies, data privacy standards, and responsible AI principles.

Lead deep technical design reviews, perform high-impact code reviews, mentor engineers, and foster a culture of engineering excellence and continuous learning.

Qualifications

8+ years of professional software engineering experience, with a proven track record of operating at a Staff, or Tech Lead level.
2+ years of hands-on experience designing, fine-tuning, and building autonomous AIagentic solutions, LLM architectures, and RAG pipelines in a production setting.
Expert-level experience with Java and Spring Boot (or equivalent enterprise frameworks like Go or advanced Node.js) building resilient distributed systems and secure RESTful APIs. Experience with SQL (MySQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB, Cassandra) schema design and performance tuning.
Deep experience building complex, production-grade web applications using React, TypeScript, Next.js, and Node.js. Strong understanding of SSR (Server-Side Rendering), state management, and building intuitive, responsive interfaces for data-dense AI workflows.
Strong experience designing and deploying distributed systems on Google Cloud Platform, specifically using Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) or Cloud Run, alongside modern CI/CD tools (Harness, Jenkins).
A strong focus on the end-user. You understand how to handle the unique UI/UX challenges of Generative AI, such as streaming model responses, conversational state management, and elegant fallback UI states.
Exceptional ability to articulate complex technical, cloud, and AI concepts to both deeply technical engineers and non-technical business stakeholders.
Preferred / Bonus Points
Proficiency in Python for backend development, quick AI prototyping, and data
processing.
Experience with open-source AI frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex).
Google Cloud Certified Professional Cloud Architect or Professional Data Engineer.
Familiarity with cybersecurity principles for AI applications.

Our Commitment

We’re trailblazers that dream big, take risks, and challenge cybersecurity’s status quo. It’s simple: we can’t accomplish our mission without diverse teams innovating, together.

We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations for all qualified individuals with a disability. If you require assistance or accommodation due to a disability or special need, please contact us at accommodations@paloaltonetworks.com.

Palo Alto Networks is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity in our workplace, and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran status, race, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or other legally protected characteristics.

All your information will be kept confidential according to EEO guidelines.

Is role eligible for Immigration Sponsorship? No. Please note that we will not sponsor applicants for work visas for this position.

We believe collaboration thrives in person. That’s why most of our teams work from the office full time, with flexibility when it’s needed. This model supports real-time problem-solving, stronger relationships, and the kind of precision that drives great outcomes.

Job Summary

  • Design, build, and scale highly available, secure backend microservices alongside modern, performance-optimized, and responsive frontends.

  • Design, orchestrate, and deploy production-ready agentic workflows that leverage LLM

  • reasoning, prompt engineering, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for independent decision-making and complex task execution.

  • Develop core full-stack components that interface with Generative AI model deployment and real-time inference systems. Optimize large-scale AI interactions for performance, low latency, and high throughput.

  • Establish long-term architectural patterns and tooling choices for our Java, Next.js, and Google Cloud ecosystem, preferably GCP Vertex AI or equivalent.

  • Champion design standards, rigorous type safety, automated testing, and comprehensive monitoring across decoupled repositories, UI components, and AI inference pipelines.

  • Ensure all full-stack applications and integrated AI systems comply with enterprise security policies, data privacy standards, and responsible AI principles.

  • Lead deep technical design reviews, perform high-impact code reviews, mentor engineers, and foster a culture of engineering excellence and continuous learning.

Qualifications

  • 8+ years of professional software engineering experience, with a proven track record of operating at a Staff, or Tech Lead level.
  • 2+ years of hands-on experience designing, fine-tuning, and building autonomous AIagentic solutions, LLM architectures, and RAG pipelines in a production setting.
  • Expert-level experience with Java and Spring Boot (or equivalent enterprise frameworks like Go or advanced Node.js) building resilient distributed systems and secure RESTful APIs. Experience with SQL (MySQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB, Cassandra) schema design and performance tuning.
  • Deep experience building complex, production-grade web applications using React, TypeScript, Next.js, and Node.js. Strong understanding of SSR (Server-Side Rendering), state management, and building intuitive, responsive interfaces for data-dense AI workflows.
  • Strong experience designing and deploying distributed systems on Google Cloud Platform, specifically using Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) or Cloud Run, alongside modern CI/CD tools (Harness, Jenkins).
  • A strong focus on the end-user. You understand how to handle the unique UI/UX challenges of Generative AI, such as streaming model responses, conversational state management, and elegant fallback UI states.
  • Exceptional ability to articulate complex technical, cloud, and AI concepts to both deeply technical engineers and non-technical business stakeholders.
  • Preferred / Bonus Points
  • Proficiency in Python for backend development, quick AI prototyping, and data
  • processing.
  • Experience with open-source AI frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex).
  • Google Cloud Certified Professional Cloud Architect or Professional Data Engineer.
  • Familiarity with cybersecurity principles for AI applications.

Our Commitment

We’re trailblazers that dream big, take risks, and challenge cybersecurity’s status quo. It’s simple: we can’t accomplish our mission without diverse teams innovating, together.

We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations for all qualified individuals with a disability. If you require assistance or accommodation due to a disability or special need, please contact us at accommodations@paloaltonetworks.com.

Palo Alto Networks is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity in our workplace, and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran status, race, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or other legally protected characteristics.

All your information will be kept confidential according to EEO guidelines.

Is role eligible for Immigration Sponsorship? No. Please note that we will not sponsor applicants for work visas for this position.

searchInput.position: frontend developer, backend developer , generative ai

json.description:
Job Summary

We are looking for a skilled software developer with 2–3 years of experience in developing HRMS applications, employee management systems, or database-driven business software. The candidate will be responsible for designing, developing, testing, and maintaining HR and database management modules while ensuring performance, scalability, and data security.

The ideal candidate should have hands-on experience in backend development, database management, API integration, and software troubleshooting.

Key Responsibilities

* Develop, maintain, and enhance HRMS software modules and database management systems.
* Design and optimize databases, queries, stored procedures, and reports.
* Collaborate with internal teams to understand business and HR operational requirements.
* Develop user-friendly web-based applications and dashboards.
* Integrate third-party APIs and internal systems where required.
* Troubleshoot software issues and provide technical support.
* Ensure software security, data integrity, and system performance.
* Prepare technical documentation and maintain development records.
* Participate in software testing, debugging, and deployment activities.

Required Skills & Qualifications

* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Software Engineering, or related field.
* 2–3 years of professional experience in software development.
* Experience in HRMS software, ERP modules, or employee management systems preferred.
* Strong knowledge of:
* SQL / MySQL / PostgreSQL or similar databases
* Backend technologies such as PHP, Python, Node.js, or .NET
* Frontend technologies such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript
* REST APIs and database integration
* Familiarity with version control systems like Git.
* Understanding of software security and data privacy practices.
* Good problem-solving and communication skills.

Preferred Qualifications

* Experience working on payroll, attendance, recruitment, or employee management modules.
* Knowledge of cloud hosting platforms and server management.
* Familiarity with reporting tools and dashboard development.
* Experience in Agile or Scrum development environments.

Salary & Benefits

* Competitive salary based on experience and skills.
* Career growth opportunities.
* Supportive and collaborative work environment.
* Paid leave and company benefits as per policy.

Pay: ₹20,000.00 - ₹65,000.00 per month

Benefits:
* Provident Fund

Work Location: In person

Location: Gurgaon GG7, Noida Yamuna, Chennai-Siruseri
Experience: 4+ Years
No of Positions: 15
Job Type: Full-time
Start Date: ASAP

Position Overview

We are seeking highly skilled Senior Backend Developers with strong expertise in Python, Java, Node.js, and SQL to join our dynamic engineering team. As a backend developer, you will be responsible for designing and developing robust, scalable server-side logic and APIs that power modern applications used by thousands of users.

Responsibilities

Design, develop, test, and maintain scalable backend services and APIs.

Write clean, maintainable code with performance, security, and reliability in mind.

Collaborate with frontend developers, architects, and product teams.

Optimize systems for performance and scalability.

Troubleshoot and resolve complex backend issues.

Implement best practices for development and architecture.

Ensure data integrity and seamless SQL database integration.

Requirements and Skills

4+ years of backend development experience.

Proficiency in Python, Java, or Node.js.

Strong experience with SQL databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, or Oracle.

Good understanding of RESTful API design and development.

Familiarity with security standards and authentication (OAuth2, JWT).

Experience with frameworks like Spring Boot, Express.js, or FastAPI.

Knowledge of data structures and software design principles.

Experience with Git or other version control systems.

Preferred Qualifications

Experience with NoSQL databases like MongoDB or Redis.

Familiarity with microservices and message queues (RabbitMQ, Kafka).

Exposure to Docker and Kubernetes.

CI/CD tools like Jenkins or GitLab CI/CD.

Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure).

Soft Skills

Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.

Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

Ability to take ownership and work in fast-paced environments.

Passion for scalable backend development.

What We Offer

We offer a competitive salary, performance-based incentives, and a supportive work environment that encourages professional growth and development. If you are a dynamic and results-driven professional with expertise in the Application Operation Team, we want to hear from you!

How to Apply

If this opportunity excites you, send your application to jobs_india@barytech.com with the subject “Application for Senior Backend Developer – Gurgaon/Noida/Chennai, India”.

Join Us

At BaryTech, we’re solving real-world challenges at the intersection of IT and innovation. Join a team of passionate professionals who believe in learning, growth, and impact-driven technology.

json.description:
Overview:

We are seeking a highly motivated Full stack Developer with strong expertise in Java, Spring Boot and React.js to design, build, and scale robust backend services. In this role, you will be responsible for developing high-performance APIs, contributing to microservices architecture, and ensuring seamless integration with frontend applications, including React-based interfaces.

You will work closely with cross-functional teams across product, engineering, and operations to deliver scalable and reliable solutions. The ideal candidate has a solid foundation in backend development, a passion for clean and efficient code, and experience building cloud-native applications with modern DevOps practices.

This role offers the opportunity to work on distributed systems, integrate with enterprise platforms, and contribute to building next-generation, real-time applications

Responsibilities:
Support the vision and guide a team of engineers to build and support TS&EP across S&T core priorities
 Partner with User Experience, Product Management, IT, Data & Analytics, Emerging Tech, Innovation, and Process Engineering teams to deliver the Digital Products portfolio
Support software development strategy utilizing industry standards. Create roadmap and timing of implementation of the roadmap based on business requirements and strategy.
Support expanding TS&EP capabilities through a customer obsessed, services-driven digital solutions platform that leverages data and AI to deliver automated and personalized experiences
Help problem solve delivery impediments, risks, issues, and changes tied to the engineering initiatives to the stakeholders
Interact with key business partners to recommend solutions that best meet the strategic needs of the business
Qualifications:
Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Engineering, or a related field.
Master’s or PhD in Computer Science or Engineering (preferred).
Minimum 8 years of relevant software development experience.
3+ years as a senior software engineer working on scalable distributed systems.
Strong understanding of data structures, algorithms, and object-oriented design.
Proficiency in Java, Spring Boot, Python, with experience in additional programming languages.
Experience in building APIs and microservices.
Familiarity with front-end technologies like React.js.
Full-stack engineering experience is preferred.
Experience with Azure, Google Cloud, AWS, and cloud-specific PaaS/SaaS solutions.
Experience with high-throughput, cloud-native distributed systems.
Deep knowledge of design patterns.
Strong verbal and written English communication skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively with global teams.

The ideal candidate should have a basic understanding of PHP frameworks, web development concepts, and a willingness to learn and grow in a fast-paced environment. Freshers with strong logical thinking and problem-solving skills are encouraged to apply.

*Key Responsibilities*

* Develop, test, and maintain web applications using PHP and related technologies
* Work with PHP frameworks such as Laravel to build scalable applications
* Design and develop RESTful APIs
* Follow MVC architecture and coding best practices
* Collaborate with front-end developers to integrate user-facing elements
* Troubleshoot, debug, and optimize application performance
* Write clean, efficient, and reusable code
* Participate in code reviews and team discussions

*Required Skills*

* Basic knowledge of PHP and frameworks like Laravel
* Understanding of MVC design patterns
* Familiarity with MySQL databases
* Basic knowledge of front-end technologies: HTML5, CSS, JavaScript
* Working knowledge of jQuery and AJAX
* Understanding of API development
* Problem-solving mindset and eagerness to learn

*Preferred Qualifications*

* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or a related field
* Strong analytical and logical thinking skills
* Ability to work independently and in a team

json.description:
Role: Senior Full-Stack Shopify Developer
Engagement Type: Staff Augmentation
Location: Offshore / Remote
Timezone: EST-aligned working hours
Experience Level: Senior

Required Experience: 7+ years of overall software development experience, including 4+ years of hands-on Shopify / Shopify Plus / Shopify Enterprise experience

Role Overview:-
We are looking for a Senior Full-Stack Shopify Developer to support Reitmans’ Shopify Enterprise ecosystem and related digital commerce initiatives. The developer will work closely with Reitmans’ internal technology, digital commerce, design, and business teams to support ongoing platform enhancements, backend customizations, integrations, troubleshooting, and agile sprint-based delivery.
This is a staff augmentation role where the selected resource will be integrated into Reitmans’ existing Scrum teams and delivery workflows. The role requires strong Shopify Enterprise expertise, full-stack development capability, and hands-on experience with TypeScript-based backend services and custom commerce integrations.

Key Responsibilities:-
The Senior Shopify Developer will be responsible for:

Providing dedicated full-stack Shopify Enterprise development and platform support.
Maintaining and enhancing existing Shopify storefront functionalities and platform capabilities.
Developing and maintaining custom backend services hosted in Azure.
Building and enhancing TypeScript-based applications, APIs, and middleware integrations.
Supporting custom functionalities implemented outside the Shopify core platform.
Working on Shopify theme enhancements and storefront customizations.
Supporting API integrations, middleware development, and third-party system integrations.
Assisting with checkout extensibility and customer experience optimization.
Troubleshooting technical issues, bugs, and production support items.
Supporting release management, deployment activities, and platform stability.
Participating in agile ceremonies including sprint planning, stand-ups, backlog grooming, retrospectives, and sprint delivery.
Collaborating with internal stakeholders, technology teams, business units, designers, and external partners as required.
Preparing technical documentation and implementation guidance when needed.

Required Skills & Experience:-
Must-have skills:

7+ years of overall software development experience.
4+ years of hands-on Shopify / Shopify Plus / Shopify Enterprise experience.
Strong full-stack development experience.
Advanced experience with TypeScript.
Experience building and maintaining custom backend services.
Experience with Azure-hosted services, applications, or integrations.
Strong understanding of APIs, middleware, and enterprise system integrations.
Experience with Shopify theme development, storefront customization, and commerce workflows.
Ability to work on custom implementations outside Shopify’s core platform.
Experience supporting production environments, troubleshooting issues, and resolving defects.
Familiarity with agile Scrum delivery models.
Ability to work in EST-aligned hours and collaborate with North American stakeholders.

Good-to-have skills:-
Experience with checkout extensibility.
Experience working on Salesforce Commerce Cloud to Shopify migration or post-migration support.
Experience with performance optimization for digital commerce platforms.
Experience coordinating with distributed teams across North American time zones.
Exposure to QA collaboration, release management, and technical documentation.

Working Model:-
The selected developer will work remotely from an offshore location while aligning with EST working hours to ensure strong overlap with Reitmans’ internal teams, Scrum ceremonies, stakeholder meetings, and delivery workflows.
The resource will be expected to integrate directly into Reitmans’ agile Scrum teams and participate in sprint planning, daily stand-ups, backlog grooming, retrospectives, and ongoing collaboration channels.

Ideal Candidate Profile:-
The ideal candidate is a senior engineer with 7+ years of software development experience and strong Shopify Enterprise expertise. They should be able to operate independently, communicate clearly with client-side stakeholders, and take ownership of assigned development work within an agile environment.
They should be comfortable working across Shopify storefronts, backend services, APIs, middleware, Azure-hosted custom commerce capabilities, and enterprise-grade digital commerce workflows.

json.description:
*About the Role*

We are looking for a passionate and skilled Full Stack Developer to join our growing technology team. The ideal candidate will work on designing, developing, and maintaining scalable web applications with modern front-end and back-end technologies. You will collaborate with product, AI, and design teams to build high-performance applications and cloud-based solutions.

*Key Responsibilities*

* Develop responsive and dynamic web applications using *Next.js* and *React.js*
* Build and maintain scalable backend APIs using *Node.js* and *Express.js*
* Design and manage databases using *PostgreSQL*, *Cloud SQL*, or similar technologies
* Integrate third-party services, authentication systems, and cloud platforms
* Work with *REST APIs*, *JSON*, and modern deployment workflows
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams for feature development and optimization
* Ensure application security, performance, and scalability
* Participate in code reviews, debugging, testing, and CI/CD processes
* Manage deployments on cloud platforms such as *AWS*, *GCP*, or *Firebase*

*Required Skills*

* Strong knowledge of *JavaScript* and *TypeScript*
* Hands-on experience with *React.js*, *Next.js*, *Node.js*, and *Express.js*
* Familiarity with *PostgreSQL* or relational databases
* Experience with *REST APIs* and backend integrations
* Understanding of authentication systems like *JWT/OAuth*
* Basic knowledge of cloud services (*AWS S3, GCP, Firebase*)
* Knowledge of GitHub, version control, and deployment pipelines
* Good problem-solving and debugging skills
* Strong communication and teamwork abilities

*Nice to Have*

* Experience with *Firebase Authentication*
* Knowledge of *CI/CD pipelines* and GitHub Actions
* Familiarity with analytics, monitoring, or logging tools
* Understanding of SSR/ISR, PWA concepts, and web accessibility
* Experience with charts, dashboards, or data-heavy applications

*Eligibility*

* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or related field
* Freshers with strong project experience can also apply

*Perks & Benefits*

* Opportunity to work on real-world scalable products
* Collaborative and innovation-driven environment
* Career growth and learning opportunities
* Exposure to cloud and AI-integrated systems

Pay: ₹25,000.00 - ₹40,000.00 per month

Work Location: In person

json.description:
At Anaplan, we are a team of innovators focused on optimizing business decision-making through our leading AI-infused scenario planning and analysis platform so our customers can outpace their competition and the market.

What unites Anaplanners across teams and geographies is our collective commitment to our customers' success and to our Winning Culture.

Our customers rank among the who's who in the Fortune 50. Coca-Cola, LinkedIn, Adobe, LVMH and Bayer are just a few of the 2,400+ global companies who rely on our best-in-class platform.

Our Winning Culture is the engine that drives our teams of innovators. We champion diversity of thought and ideas, we behave like leaders regardless of title, we are committed to achieving ambitious goals, and we love celebrating our wins – big and small.

Supported by operating principles of being strategy-led, values-based and disciplined in execution, you'll be inspired, connected, developed and rewarded here. Everything that makes you unique is welcome; join us and let's build what's next - together!

Engineer II Software Development – Platform Experience

Team Description

Join the Platform Experience team, a core group within our GPTO Engineering organization, where you will report to the Director of Engineering. Our team is on a mission to provide the unshakeable foundation of trust, security, and scale for the entire Anaplan ecosystem. We empower our internal developers and external partners to build with speed and confidence.

Your Impact

Contribute significantly to the design and execution of our Platform Experience, playing a vital role across Product Security, Platform Management, and Data Integration initiatives.
Design, build, and maintain the highly available, secure, and scalable services that form the backbone of our platform.
Champion engineering excellence through high-quality, hands-on coding, collaborative design reviews, and mentorship of junior engineers on our backend technology stack (Java, Kotlin, Go, .NET).
Actively participate in technical planning, contribute to our team's strategy, and engage in critical incident retrospectives to foster a culture of continuous improvement.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including product managers and other engineering groups, to deliver robust and reliable platform solutions.

Your Qualifications

A strong seniority in full-stack web development ideally using Frontend technologies such as TypeScript, Node.js, React.js, Redux and Backend such as Java, Kotlin, Spring Framework, MySQL
Proficiency in using REST APIs or similar for data integration.
Experience working in production with cloud infrastructure such as AWS, GCP or Azure.
Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Git, Helm
Experience with building observability into services to track usage and health (Grafana stack)
A deep understanding of the value of testing to deliver a high-quality product.
Working knowledge of containers and orchestration tools like Docker and Kubernetes.
Experience working closely with product management and UX teams to deliver the best solution to the problem at hand.
A strong background in fostering a culture of continuous delivery, test automation and agile development.
Experience in ExpressJS/Next.js, Webpack, WebSocket, Gulp are a plus
Strong communication and collaboration skills - you are pragmatic and know how to build trust.
BS degree in Computer Science or related technical field, or equivalent practical experience.

Preferred Skills

Experience with private and public cloud platforms (GCP, AWS, or Azure).
Proven ability to influence your team's technical decisions and lead projects to completion.
A passion for mentoring other engineers and elevating the team's capabilities.
Experience with CI/CD best practices, infrastructure-as-code tools (like Terraform).

 Experience - 6- 12 Years

We know that great talent comes from a variety of backgrounds, and we encourage you to apply even if your experience doesn't perfectly match every qualification on this list.

Our Commitment to Diversity, Equity, Inclusion and Belonging (DEIB)

We believe attracting and retaining the best talent and fostering an inclusive culture strengthens our business. DEIB improves our workforce, enhances trust with our partners and customers, and drives business success. Build your career in a place where diversity, equity, inclusion and belonging aren't just words on paper – this is what drives our innovation, it's how we connect, and it contributes to what makes us a market leader. We believe in a hiring and working environment where all people are respected and valued, regardless of gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, religion, ethnicity, age, neurodiversity, disability status, citizenship, or any other aspect which makes people unique. We hire you for who you are, and we want you to bring your authentic self to work every day!

We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, perform essential job functions, and receive equitable benefits and all privileges of employment. Please contact us to request accommodation.

Fraud Recruitment Disclaimer

It has come to our attention that fraudulent and fictitious job opportunities are being circulated on the Internet. Prospective candidates are being contacted by certain individuals, mainly through telephone calls, emails and correspondence, claiming they are representatives of Anaplan. The main purpose of these correspondences and announcements is to obtain privileged information from individuals.

Anaplan does not:

Extend offers to candidates without an extensive interview process with a member of our recruitment team and a hiring manager via video or in person.
Send job offers via email. All offers are first extended verbally by a member of our internal recruitment team whenever possible and then followed up via written communication.

All emails from Anaplan would come from an @anaplan.com email address. Should you have any doubts about the authenticity of an email, letter or telephone communication purportedly from, for, or on behalf of Anaplan, please send an email to people@anaplan.com before taking any further action in relation to the correspondence.

searchInput.position: frontend developer, backend developer , generative ai

json.description:
Gushwork is reinventing how businesses get discovered online. We're an agentic AI startup that helps B2B companies show up in AI answer engines like ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity - by building a content engine on websites designed to attract AI visitors alongside human visitors.

We're a US and Bengaluru-based company that's raised over $11M from top-tier global VCs including Lightspeed (backers of Anthropic, Grafana, Mistral), SIG, B Capital & Beenext. While search behavior is rapidly shifting toward AI, most B2B companies are being left behind. We're changing that.

We're at an exciting inflection point - moving fast, solving hard problems, and building technology that's becoming critical infrastructure as AI reshapes how buyers find solutions. If you want to work on challenging problems with a talented team in a high-growth environment, we'd love to meet you.

More about the role below - if you feel it's a fit, we are excited to meet you!

what you'll do

help build and ship next-generation backend capabilities - ai-led content research, webpage generation pipelines, lead capture, and integrations that power the product

design and evolve apis and services across ecs, lambdas, step functions, queues, and the data stores behind them (postgres, mongo, redis)

keep systems performant, robust, and reliable - query and workflow tuning, idempotency, retries, observability, and on-call-friendly runbooks

collaborate with product and frontend teams on contracts, rollout, and failure modes so shipping stays fast without surprises in prod

own high-risk paths with extra care - auth, migrations, multi-tenant boundaries, and anything that touches customer domains or data isolation

write clear docs and runbooks for services, ops, and processes

why we'll like you

backend ownership

you have shipped production backend systems that other teams and customers depend on - not only scripts or one-off jobs

you are comfortable owning a bet from ticket to production - scoping, implementation, monitoring, and iteration

you can hold api design, data model, async workflows, and deployment in mind at once without losing the customer outcome

product minded

you tie technical work to customer and roadmap impact - you ask when and why is unclear instead of guessing

you prefer small, reviewable PRs and measurable rollout over large surprise diffs

you treat auth, migrations, and customer-domain routing as high-risk paths that deserve extra review and a clear rollback story

ai native

you have built or operated software where LLMs or AI pipelines are part of the product path - code generation, orchestration, evals, cost, testability and reliability included

you care about quality, cost, and failure modes of AI-assisted flows (latency, retries, queues, human-in-the-loop where needed)

backend capabilities

you have worked on Node.js and/or Python services in production at meaningful traffic, data volume, or workflow complexity

you are comfortable on AWS-shaped systems - lambdas, api gateway, ecs, rds postgres, sqs, step functions, secrets - or you ramp quickly with our stack

you know how to maintain reliable systems while shipping fast - observability (e.g. Sentry), sane defaults, and pragmatic tradeoffs

you know how to build and ship ci/cd pipelines and safe deploy patterns for the services you own

craft

you treat and nurture your code like a piece of art, with the right balance of simplicity and complexity, without sacrificing speed

you have a high bias to action (run those POCs with cursor/claude code), and a low bias to over-engineering

human

you build trust with PMs, designers, and engineers - async updates in Slack, threads not @channel noise

you admit what you do not know and pull in the right owner (buddy, infra, security) early

you explain complex ideas clearly in writing - specs, PR descriptions, and docs

you hold 3+ years of experience
why you'll love us

you'll be part of an early team at a fast-growing company, with a lot of impact

you'll get to work with really smart and helpful people

we constantly adopt the latest technologies and stay close to the latest ai innovations

opportunity to influence the direction of the product and engineering culture

flexible PTO policy

unlimited ai usage

plus cool swag, a stocked pantry, and other benefits

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

what you'll do

  • help build and ship next-generation backend capabilities - ai-led content research, webpage generation pipelines, lead capture, and integrations that power the product

  • design and evolve apis and services across ecs, lambdas, step functions, queues, and the data stores behind them (postgres, mongo, redis)

  • keep systems performant, robust, and reliable - query and workflow tuning, idempotency, retries, observability, and on-call-friendly runbooks

  • collaborate with product and frontend teams on contracts, rollout, and failure modes so shipping stays fast without surprises in prod

  • own high-risk paths with extra care - auth, migrations, multi-tenant boundaries, and anything that touches customer domains or data isolation

  • write clear docs and runbooks for services, ops, and processes

why we'll like you

backend ownership

  • you have shipped production backend systems that other teams and customers depend on - not only scripts or one-off jobs

  • you are comfortable owning a bet from ticket to production - scoping, implementation, monitoring, and iteration

  • you can hold api design, data model, async workflows, and deployment in mind at once without losing the customer outcome

product minded

  • you tie technical work to customer and roadmap impact - you ask when and why is unclear instead of guessing

  • you prefer small, reviewable PRs and measurable rollout over large surprise diffs

  • you treat auth, migrations, and customer-domain routing as high-risk paths that deserve extra review and a clear rollback story

ai native

  • you have built or operated software where LLMs or AI pipelines are part of the product path - code generation, orchestration, evals, cost, testability and reliability included

  • you care about quality, cost, and failure modes of AI-assisted flows (latency, retries, queues, human-in-the-loop where needed)

backend capabilities

  • you have worked on Node.js and/or Python services in production at meaningful traffic, data volume, or workflow complexity

  • you are comfortable on AWS-shaped systems - lambdas, api gateway, ecs, rds postgres, sqs, step functions, secrets - or you ramp quickly with our stack

  • you know how to maintain reliable systems while shipping fast - observability (e.g. Sentry), sane defaults, and pragmatic tradeoffs

  • you know how to build and ship ci/cd pipelines and safe deploy patterns for the services you own

craft

  • you treat and nurture your code like a piece of art, with the right balance of simplicity and complexity, without sacrificing speed

  • you have a high bias to action (run those POCs with cursor/claude code), and a low bias to over-engineering

human

  • you build trust with PMs, designers, and engineers - async updates in Slack, threads not @channel noise

  • you admit what you do not know and pull in the right owner (buddy, infra, security) early

  • you explain complex ideas clearly in writing - specs, PR descriptions, and docs

  • you hold 3+ years of experience

why you'll love us

  • you'll be part of an early team at a fast-growing company, with a lot of impact

  • you'll get to work with really smart and helpful people

  • we constantly adopt the latest technologies and stay close to the latest ai innovations

  • opportunity to influence the direction of the product and engineering culture

  • flexible PTO policy

  • unlimited ai usage

  • plus cool swag, a stocked pantry, and other benefits

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

searchInput.position: frontend developer, backend developer , generative ai

json.description:
Overview:

We are seeking a highly motivated Backend Developer with strong expertise in Java and Spring Boot to design, build, and scale robust backend services. In this role, you will be responsible for developing high-performance APIs, contributing to microservices architecture, and ensuring seamless integration with frontend applications, including React-based interfaces.

You will work closely with cross-functional teams across product, engineering, and operations to deliver scalable and reliable solutions. The ideal candidate has a solid foundation in backend development, a passion for clean and efficient code, and experience building cloud-native applications with modern DevOps practices.

This role offers the opportunity to work on distributed systems, integrate with enterprise platforms, and contribute to building next-generation, real-time applications

Responsibilities:
Support the vision and be part of the team of engineers to build and support digital products and solutions (DPS) across S&T core priorities
Should be able to design, development, and deployment of cutting-edge applications, ensuring alignment with organizational goals.
Collaborate with product managers, Scrum masters and team leads to take user stories and code them with proper development standards.
Support software development strategy utilizing industry standards. Create roadmap and timing of implementation of the roadmap based on business requirements and strategy.
Support expanding DPS capabilities through a customer obsessed, services-driven digital solutions platform that leverages data and AI to deliver automated and personalized experiences
Help problem solve delivery impediments, risks, issues, and changes tied to the engineering initiatives to the stakeholders
Interact with key business partners to recommend solutions that best meet the strategic needs of the business
Qualifications:
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
7+ years of software development experience, with a strong focus on backend development using Java and Spring Boot.
Proficiency in Java, Spring Boot, and backend frameworks, with working knowledge of React.js for frontend integration.
Strong experience in building and consuming RESTful APIs, and familiarity with GraphQL and third-party service integrations.
Solid understanding of microservices architecture, API design principles, and backend system scalability.
Experience with databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, or NoSQL systems, including data modeling and performance tuning.
Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and experience in deploying backend services in cloud environments.
Exposure to CI/CD pipelines, containerization (Docker), and DevOps practices.
Understanding of authentication and authorization mechanisms (OAuth2, JWT, etc.).
Knowledge of frontend-backend integration, including working with React-based applications.
Strong grasp of software design principles, design patterns, and best practices for backend development.
Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively across global teams.

searchInput.position: frontend developer, backend developer , generative ai

json.description:
Objective:

We are looking for a highly dynamic, motivated, and collaborative person to join our team. We are focused on the
modernization of legacy systems and development of new capabilities of digital solutions in the Operations
Platform team. There is a growing global need within BASF to leverage digitalization to continue BASF's journey
of excellence and continuously improving our capabilities especially through digitalization.
In this role, you will work alongside a global development team to create and iteratively improve upon a global, internal full stack
development solution with a focus on an open source stack and a cloud-based platform.

Main Task:

Own end-to-end delivery of product features (frontend, backend, integration) from discovery through
production support.
Lead solution design and architecture (APIs, service boundaries, data models), ensuring scalability,
maintainability, and security.
Translate business needs into technical requirements; proactively manage trade-offs (scope,
performance, cost, time) with stakeholders.
Set and uphold engineering standards: code reviews, automated testing strategy, performance
benchmarking, and secure coding practices.
Leverage AI-assisted engineering responsibly (e.g., copilots/LLMs) to improve delivery and quality; evaluate and integrate AI capabilities where valuable, ensuring data privacy, security, and model governance.
Design and improve CI/CD pipelines and release processes; drive infrastructure-as-code and
environment standardization.
Own production readiness: observability (logs/metrics/traces), on-call/incident response support, root cause analysis, and continuous improvement.
Drive modernization of legacy components (refactoring, migration, deprecation) and actively manage technical debt with a clear roadmap.
Mentor engineers through pairing, coaching, and design/code reviews; contribute to hiring, onboarding, and knowledge sharing.
Create and maintain technical documentation (architecture decisions, runbooks, API contracts) and ensure compliance with internal security and quality policies.

Job Requirements:

minimum requirement to carry out the work - you might want to point out "additional plus/nice to have skills" that are not
mandatory

Education Degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, informatics, business informatics or
in a comparable field
Work experience More than 5+ years in a senior developer role for a large team
Technical & Professional
Knowledge (mandatory)
 Advanced Angular and TypeScript.
 Microfrontend architecture
 Monorepo setup (module federation or similar), shared libraries, versioning, and
dependency management.
 Strong Java and Spring Boot expertise (REST APIs, security, data access, testing).
 Cloud-native application development (containers, scalable deployments,
configuration/secrets, resilience, cost awareness).
 Practical AI understanding for software teams (AI-assisted development and/or building
AI-enabled features), including data privacy, security, and responsible use.
 Proven technical leadership: driving architecture decisions, mentoring, and collaborating
effectively across product, UX, and platform teams.
Technical & Professional
Knowledge (additional
plus/nice to have skills)
 Azure DevOps (Repos, Pipelines, Boards) and CI/CD automation for Angular +
Java/Spring Boot stacks.
 Experience working with international, distributed teams (cross-timezone collaboration,
communication, and stakeholder management).
 Infrastructure-as-code and platform exposure (e.g., Terraform/Bicep, Kubernetes, API
gateways, message brokers, caches).
 AI-enabled application patterns (e.g., RAG, vector search, prompt evaluation, guardrails)
and integrating with model endpoints.

json.positionName: Senior Software Engineer - C#, Angular, FACETS, Agile
json.description:
Optum is a global organization that delivers care, aided by technology to help millions of people live healthier lives. The work you do with our team will directly improve health outcomes by connecting people with the care, pharmacy benefits, data and resources they need to feel their best. Here, you will find a culture guided by inclusion, talented peers, comprehensive benefits and career development opportunities. Come make an impact on the communities we serve as you help us advance health optimization on a global scale. Join us to start Caring. Connecting. Growing together.

Primary Responsibilities:

Be able to understand the Facets Delivery, Client priority and requirements
Good in adapting & adopting new technology footprints to optimize business solutions
Applies knowledge of principles and techniques to solve technical problems
Be able to translate the business requirements/functional design to job design
Be able to work on EDI transactions like 837 and 835
Be able to contribute in DevOps, CI/CD and other engineering forums
Be able to design, develop UI solutions by using C#.NET/ Angular JS
Design, build, and deploy AI programs and intelligent components, including classification models, prediction models, natural-language workflows, and document processing solutions
Should have solid organizational skills and focus on accuracy and attention to detail
Self-motivated with the ability to work both independently and in a team environment
Actively engaged as a scrum team member in all agile mechanisms
Reviews, analyzes, develop/modifies and Completes stories within definition of done, on time within original estimates
Responsible for all aspects of deliverable (detailed code design, coding, unit and integration test, automation, and deployment)
Able to understand the existing designs and technology choices within products, and make appropriate adjustments to existing designs when necessary
Should be involved in peer reviews
Develop innovative approaches on performance optimization & automation
Delivers solutions devoid of significant security vulnerabilities
Participates in on-call rotation
Tickets are closed within SLA
Applies learnings from on-call rotation into delivered software
Contributes to outage retrospective discussions and documentation
Participate in Requirement gathering and Production Support for incidents
Provide timely updates on tasks

Adherence to the defined SLA Compliance etc,

Comply with the terms and conditions of the employment contract, company policies and procedures, and any and all directives (such as, but not limited to, transfer and/or re-assignment to different work locations, change in teams and/or work shifts, policies in regards to flexibility of work benefits and/or work environment, alternative work arrangements, and other decisions that may arise due to the changing business environment). The Company may adopt, vary or rescind these policies and directives in its absolute discretion and without any limitation (implied or otherwise) on its ability to do so

Required Qualifications:

Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience
5+ years overall IT experience
4+ years of experience in Facets Claims domain
4+ years of development and testing experience in C# / .Net programming language
4+ years Database Design/Programming
2+ years of Agile experience
Healthcare EDI Experience
CI/CD Experience
Knowledge using AI Builder, Azure AI Services, and Generative AI tools to enhance solution intelligence, automate workflows, and improve operational efficiency
Good knowledge on US Healthcare Industry
Knowledge of data-streaming (like kafka)
Knowledge of NetworX Pricer
Good understanding of Medicaid / Medicare line of business
Comfortable in executing SQL queries, procedures, cursors

At UnitedHealth Group, our mission is to help people live healthier lives and make the health system work better for everyone. We believe everyone-of every race, gender, sexuality, age, location and income-deserves the opportunity to live their healthiest life. Today, however, there are still far too many barriers to good health which are disproportionately experienced by people of color, historically marginalized groups and those with lower incomes. We are committed to mitigating our impact on the environment and enabling and delivering equitable care that addresses health disparities and improves health outcomes - an enterprise priority reflected in our mission.

json.description:
*Java and Angular (Full-Stack Developer)*

*Experience *: 1 to 3 yrs

*Location *: Chennai

*Job Summary*

We are looking for a self-driven Java and Angular Fresher to join our development team. The candidate will independently contribute to web applications using Java on the backend and Angular on the frontend, leveraging AI-assisted development tools to improve productivity and code quality.

*Key Responsibilities*

* Design and develop web applications using Java (Spring/Spring Boot) and Angular
* Use AI-assisted tools for code generation, refactoring, and test creation while remaining fully responsible for correctness and design
* Implement responsive user interfaces with Angular, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and TypeScript
* Develop and consume RESTful APIs to integrate front-end and back-end components
* Apply AI tools to support unit testing, debugging, static analysis, and documentation of features
* Participate in Agile/Scrum ceremonies, take ownership of assigned user stories, and deliver end-to-end features
* Maintain and optimize existing applications for performance, scalability, and security
* Contribute to and review code using Git-based workflows, supported by AI code review suggestions where appropriate

*Required Skills and Qualifications*

* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field (or final-year student)
* Good understanding of Core Java concepts (OOP, collections, exceptions, basic multithreading)
* Basic knowledge of Java web development using Spring/Spring Boot
* Familiarity with Angular fundamentals (components, modules, services, routing)
* Exposure to AI-assisted development tools (e.g., AI code assistants, AI test generators, AI documentation helpers) and willingness to integrate them into daily work
* Experience with HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and TypeScript through projects or coursework
* Basic knowledge of relational databases and SQL
* Familiarity with RESTful APIs and JSON
* Understanding of Git and collaborative development workflows
* Strong problem-solving skills, ability to learn independently, and sense of ownership for delivered features

*Nice-to-Have Qualifications*

* Academic or personal projects using both Java and Angular, ideally with some AI-assisted development in the workflow
* Knowledge of unit testing frameworks such as JUnit for Java and Jasmine/Karma for Angular
* Basic understanding of CI/CD concepts and tools (e.g., Maven/Gradle, Jenkins, GitLab CI) where AI is used to monitor builds and quality gates

Interested candidates are requested to share their resume at *noteezhiring@gmail.com*
call/WhatsApp @ *7708897421*
*Contact HR :* Deepanya R

*Regards,*

HR Team

Pay: ₹20,000.00 - ₹30,000.00 per month

Work Location: In person

json.description:
Full stack Developer / Backend Developer / Frontend Developer

We are looking for passionate and skilled developers to join our growing technology team. The ideal candidate should have hands-on experience in developing scalable web applications and working with modern backend and frontend technologies.

Responsibilities

* Develop and maintain scalable web applications using Python, Django, and Angular.
* Design, develop, test, and deploy backend APIs and frontend modules.
* Work with HTML, CSS, and responsive UI development.
* Deploy and manage applications on AWS cloud infrastructure.
* Containerize applications using Docker.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams for feature development and system improvements.
* Optimize application performance, security, and scalability.
* Participate in code reviews, debugging, and troubleshooting.
* Maintain proper documentation and follow development best practices.

Required Skills

* Strong experience in Python and Django.
* Good understanding of Angular framework.
* Knowledge of HTML, CSS, and frontend development practices.
* Experience with AWS services and Docker.
* Understanding of REST APIs and database design.

Preferred Skills

* Experience with Kubernetes and Jenkins.
* Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines.
* Familiarity with Pandas and NumPy.
* Exposure to Generative AI technologies and integrations.

Candidate Profile

* Strong problem-solving and logical thinking skills.
* Ability to work independently and in a team environment.
* Good communication and analytical skills.
* Passion for learning new technologies and building scalable solutions.

Benefits:
* Health insurance
* Provident Fund

Work Location: In person
